Name: Telit Cinterion
Description:
We empower customers and partners who demand best-in-class IoT performance. Our proven engineering practices and advanced design methodologies not only meet but exceed the most stringent environmental and industry standards.

With a true end-to-end system approach, our IoT experts ensure seamless device connectivity, enabling businesses to manage devices, connectivity, and everything in between with confidence.

Explore our award-winning IoT modules, global cellular data plans, edge AI, secure data orchestration, and custom solutions — all designed to help you turn your vision into reality. Connect with us to scale your digital transformation and change how your business harnesses AI.

Name: Bluetooth SIG
Description: We are a community of the world’s most inventive companies and people collaborating to fulfill the essential need to connect. Together, we advance, protect, and promote Bluetooth technology, the global standard for connection.

Name: Sierra Wireless
Description: Sierra Wireless (a Semtech Company) is a world leading IoT solutions provider that combines devices, network services, and software to unlock value in the connected economy. Companies globally are adopting 4G, 5G, and LPWA solutions to improve operational efficiency, create better customer experiences, improve their business models, and create new revenue streams. Sierra Wireless works with its customers to develop the right industry-specific solution for their IoT deployments, whether this is an integrated solution to help connect edge devices to the cloud, a software/API service to manage processes with billions of connected assets, or a platform to extract real-time data to improve business decisions. With more than 25 years of cellular IoT experience, Sierra Wireless is the global partner customers trust to deliver them their next IoT solution. For more information, visit www.sierrawireless.com and www.semtech.com.

Name: Wi-Fi Alliance
Description:
Wi-Fi Alliance is the worldwide network of companies that brings you Wi-Fi. Members of our collaboration forum come together from across the Wi-Fi ecosystem with the shared vision to connect everyone and everything, everywhere, while providing the best possible user experience. Since 2000, Wi-Fi Alliance has completed more than 85,000 Wi-Fi certifications. The Wi-Fi CERTIFIED seal of approval designates products with proven interoperability, backward compatibility, and the highest industry-standard security protections in place. Today, Wi-Fi carries more than half of the internet’s traffic in an ever-expanding variety of applications. Wi-Fi Alliance continues to drive the adoption and evolution of Wi-Fi, which billions of people rely on every day.

Name: Worldsensing
Description: Worldsensing is a global IoT pioneer. We are experts in monitoring large-scale and civil infrastructure through IoT remote technology. Together with a global partner network, we serve engineering customers in 70+ countries across mining, construction, rail and structural health.

Name: Virgin Mobile Latam
Description: Virgin Mobile Latam ("VMLA") is the largest and fastest growing virtual mobile operator in Latin America. VMLA currently has operations in Chile, Colombia and Mexico, and will continue to expand is business across the region with Beyond One.

Name: RADWIN
Description: RADWIN is a leading provider of Point-to-Multipoint and Point-to-Point broadband wireless solutions. Incorporating the most advanced technologies such as a Beam-forming antenna and an innovative Air Interface, RADWIN’s systems deliver optimal performance in the toughest conditions including high interference and obstructed line-of-sight. Deployed in over 170 countries, RADWIN’s solutions power applications including backhaul, broadband access, private network connectivity, video surveillance transmission as well as delivering broadband on the move for trains, vehicles and vessels.

Name: Rajant Corporation
Description: Rajant Corporation is the broadband communications technology company that invented Kinetic Mesh networking, BreadCrumb wireless nodes, and InstaMesh networking software. With Rajant, customers can rapidly deploy a highly adaptable and scalable network that leverages the power of real-time data to deliver on-demand, mission-critical business intelligence. A low-latency, high-throughput, and secure solution for a variety of data, voice, video, and autonomous applications, Rajant’s Kinetic Mesh networks provide industrial customers with full mobility, allowing them to take their private network applications and data anywhere. With successful deployments in more than 80 countries for customers in military, mining, ports, rail, oil & gas, petrochemical plants, municipalities, and agriculture. Rajant is headquartered in Malvern, Pennsylvania, with additional facilities and offices in Arizona and Kentucky. For more information, visit Rajant.com.

Name: Qualcomm Innovation Center, Inc.
Description:
Qualcomm Innovation Center, Inc. is a wholly owned subsidiary of Qualcomm that brings together a dedicated group of engineers focused on this area of growing innovation. With the goal of investing greater resources into enabling and optimizing open source software with Qualcomm technology, Qualcomm Innovation Center, Inc. works closely with the open source community to enable the faster advancement of the wireless industry as a whole.

Open source and community-driven software development is becoming increasingly important to the wireless industry. As connected consumer products ranging from traditional handsets and sophisticated Smartphones to mobile computing devices grow in functionality, open software is helping spur the creativity and innovation that will allow these devices to provide more advanced services -- and thus greater value than ever before. In recognition of this market dynamic, Qualcomm Inc. formed the Qualcomm Innovation Center, Inc.

Name: Visible
Description:
At Visible, we’re on a mission to dramatically change the wireless service experience.

Name: iBwave Solutions Inc.
Description:
iBwave, the global in-building standard, serves over 1,000 leading telecommunication companies in more than 90 countries worldwide, with innovative indoor wireless solutions. Our leading software suite empowers operators, system integrators, enterprises and OEMs to provide optimum network coverage and capacity inside buildings and venues. We also offer quality hands-on training and certification programs, instilling awareness and proficiency in in-building wireless network design.

Name: CWNP
Description:
CWNP is the industry standard for vendor-neutral, enterprise wireless LAN certifications, offering four levels of enterprise WLAN certification, from novice to expert:

CWS - Enterprise Wi-Fi Specialist
CWT - Enterprise Wi-Fi Technologist
CWTS - Wi-Fi Technology Specialist (Fundamentals)
CWNA - Enterprise Wi-Fi Administration (Associate Level)
CWSA - Enterprise Wireless Solutions (Associate Level)
CWSP - Enterprise Wi-Fi Security (Professional Level)
CWAP - Enterprise Wi-Fi Analysis & Troubleshooting (Professional Level)
CWDP - Enterprise Wi-Fi Network Design (Professional Level)
CWNE - Enterprise Wi-Fi Network Expert (The name says it all..)

Our goal is to educate IT professionals to find success in wireless. 

We do this by providing the resources and certifications to gain knowledge in the technology behind ALL enterprise WLAN products.  This enables professionals who hold our certifications to enter a business and manage its wireless LAN infrastructure regardless of the vendor solution utilized and scale. 

Our certifications have been utilized by IT professionals in 140 countries to make wireless LANs more cost-effective, reliable and secure.

twitter.com/CWNP

Name: SIMCom
Description: SIMCom Wireless Solutions Limited is global leading Machine-to-Machine (M2M) wireless modules and solutions supplier, Since established in 2002, SIMCom has been fully committed to provide a variety of wireless technology platform modules and terminal level solutions around the world, such as GSM/GPRS/EDGE, WCDMA/HSPA/HSPA+, CDMA 1xRTT/EV-DO, FDD/TDD-LTE, LTE-M(CAT-M1), NB-IoTcellular communication and GPS/GLONASS/BEIDOU satellite positioning technology.

Name: Cavli Wireless
Description:
At Cavli Wireless, we are building the next generation of IoT connectivity management technology through advanced intelligent hardware, robust network access, and a modem management cloud. Our mission is to simplify and accelerate global IoT adoption with seamless, future-proof, and scalable connectivity solutions for enterprises worldwide.

Our comprehensive portfolio includes advanced cellular IoT modules such as LPWA/NB, LTE Cat 1bis, LTE Cat 1/4/6, Automotive, 5G RedCap, and 5G NR. Additionally, our Cavli Hubble IoT connectivity and device management platform enables businesses to design, deploy, and manage connected solutions efficiently.

Cavli’s C-Series IoT modules, designed and manufactured in India, offer enterprise-grade performance with integrated eSIM/iSIM and preloaded global connectivity. By streamlining the IoT value chain, we reduce fragmentation, lower deployment costs, and accelerate time-to-market across industries like Connected Automotive Applications, Industry 4.0, Smart Energy & Utilities, Fleet Management & Logistics, Asset Tracking, Smart Cities, and Healthcare. Our customer base spans Europe, India, Taiwan, and the Asia-Pacific region, reinforcing our global reach.

Through Cavli Hubble, our scalable Connectivity-as-a-Service (CaaS) platform, businesses gain access to remote provisioning, eSIM management, OTA updates, and real-time diagnostics from a single dashboard.

Cavli collaborates with Qualcomm to drive innovation and enhance product performance. Supported by a robust Global Distributed Supply Chain, Cavli Wireless delivers cutting-edge IoT connectivity solutions to enterprises worldwide, ensuring reliable and efficient product delivery.

With a commitment to innovation and a team of industry experts, Cavli Wireless is dedicated to democratizing IoT connectivity and empowering businesses with smart, secure, and scalable IoT solutions.

Name: Affirmed Networks
Description:
Affirmed Networks delivers the world’s only fully virtualized, cloud-native mobile core solution. Deployed in over 85 networks worldwide including Tier 1 operators such as AT&T, Vodafone, Du, Digicel, Etisalat, Softbank, Turkcell and more, our webscale solutions allow operators to transform the economics of deploying and scaling 3G, 4G, 5G and Wi-Fi mobile services. Built on a microservices architecture, Affirmed’s 5G Mobile Core enables operators to out innovate competition with industry-leading technology. Affirmed’s solution couples industry-leading performance and scale with unbound service agility enabling rapid creation and delivery of new services.

Affirmed’s mobile core capabilities include: 5G NR, CUPS, network slicing, integrated virtual probes, optimized IoT access(NB-IoT/LTE-M/SCEF), virtualized DPI and GiLAN services, WiFi and Service Automation, enabling operators to economically scale networks and take advantage of 5G capabilities today, delivering differentiated services tailored to specific use cases(Consumer, IoT, MVNO, Fixed Wireless) more quickly, and improve the overall customer experience. We offer a complete approach to NFV that includes not only the right technology but the right people and process to ensure your virtualization efforts are running smoothly and profitably.

Name: Good Powered by BlackBerry
Description:
Welcome to the Good Technology LinkedIn page! Please follow us for regular updates on our company, product tips, blog articles and mobile news. 

Who are we?

We're innovators, data protectors and enablers of mobile business. We're passionate about secure mobility and protecting the data on iOS, Android and Windows Phone devices everywhere.
 
Good Technology is the leader in secure mobility, delivering solutions across all stages of the mobility lifecycle for enterprises and governments worldwide. Good offers a comprehensive, end-to-end solutions portfolio, consisting of a suite of collaboration applications, a secure mobility platform, mobile device management, unified monitoring, management and analytics, and a third-party application and partner ecosystem.

All together, the Good Dynamics platform has enabled over 13,000 software developers to create more than 1,600 custom applications. More than 6,200 organizations in 189 countries use Good Technology, and we are trusted and deployed in 100% of the FORTUNE 100 commercial banks and aerospace and defense firms as well as leaders across healthcare, manufacturing and retail.

Name: Senceive
Description:
Our precise, reliable and robust products directly reflect the specific demands of civil engineering, rail and mining environments and empower those responsible for infrastructure construction and maintenance to proceed with confidence. 

Since 2005, we have focused on bringing intelligent wireless condition monitoring to civil engineering and rail applications. Today, Senceive is widely seen as the global leader for wireless remote condition monitoring solutions, with more than 30,000 sensors installed in 2020 alone. 

Our wireless remote condition monitoring technology is used in 35 countries in civil engineering, rail, mining and more. The possibilities are immense. Some clients use it to make infrastructure safer by detecting problems such as landslips before they affect roads or railway tracks, or for early warning of movement in dams or flood defences before they fail. 

Other clients use it to support efficient use of scarce maintenance resources, for example by measuring changes in railway track geometry to pinpoint where maintenance is needed. And others use it to monitor the effects of activity such as tunnel construction on nearby buildings and structures. 

Senceive is part of Eddyfi Technologies' Remote Monitoring Solutions

Contact us to see how we can help you. 
info@senceive.com

Name: BearCom
Description:
For more than 40 years, BearCom has designed and delivered high-performance wireless voice, security, and data communication solutions that boost operating efficiency and increase safety for leading airlines, manufacturing and petrochemical plants, distribution centers, hotels and resorts, construction firms, public safety agencies, schools, and more. Every year, our rentals team supports major sporting events, award shows, conventions, and fairs, as well as the largest music festivals in the nation.

Whether you need a multi-point wireless network to connect your work teams, a fully integrated two-way radio system to combine voice and data across your facility, a bi-directional amplifier to enable communications between first responders in an emergency, or any other wireless solution to improve staff collaboration, BearCom can help. Our knowledgeable team is ready to meet your challenges with a wide selection of innovative equipment, infrastructure, and solutions that enhance the success of your communications, IoT, and M2M programs. With our proven expertise serving more than 20,000 customers in nearly every commercial and public sector, you can count on BearCom to design and deliver the best solutions for your organization.

BearCom is headquartered in the Dallas, Texas area with over 80 locations across North America, employing more than 1400 people. BearCom is Motorola Solutions' largest value-added reseller (VAR) and has earned the prestigious Platinum Channel Partner and Service Elite Specialist designations.

BearCom can provide your organization with a complete suite of wireless products and services:

● Equipment sales
● Short-term rentals for events
● Long-term leasing
● Equipment management
● Service and repair
● Custom systems design
● Narrowbanding

Name: Wireless Advocates
Description:
Wireless Advocates is a leading provider of wireless products and services both online and in nearly 700 retail locations nationwide. Together with the top wireless carriers (Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile) and manufacturers (Apple, Samsung, Google) - our knowledgeable team of wireless experts are here to help people connect.

At Wireless Advocates, we continuously engage with the top wireless manufacturers, providers and channel partners to bring you the very best deals in wireless products and services. The goal – to make purchasing wireless simpler. By partnering with all the major carriers and manufacturers, we’re able to provide our customers a full range of wireless choices and the unbiased consultation they need to select the device and plan that’s best for them.

Name: Ai-Thinker
Description:
Ai-Thinker Co., LTD was established in 2012 and is a leading provider of end-to-end wireless connectivity solutions within the smart industry. Our public division is integrated, encompassing self-research, self-production, and self-marketing all in one. We possess a core team with 12 years of industry experience, along with mature hardware and software, as well as core supply chain resources and over 3,000 customer service experiences.

Our main businesses include antennas, IoT modules, RF testing, cloud services, and PCBA services, providing customers with one-stop solutions.

Our company's main products encompass WiFi, LoRa/LoRaWAN, Bluetooth, Radar, AI-Thinker open-source hardware, offline voice recognition, UWB, GPS, 2.4G modules, and more. Our products have obtained certifications such as FCC, CE, IC, SRRC, ROHS, REACH, and are served in over 100 countries and regions.

Multiple automated production lines ensure swift prototyping, rapid verification, and expedited shipping. With ISO 9001 international quality system certification, we've achieved an unprecedented balance of timeliness and quality standards.

Contact Us: overseas@aithinker.com

Name: SIMO
Description:
SIMO delivers seamless global connectivity through one simple partnership.
 We eliminate the complexity of managing hundreds of carrier contracts across 140+ countries.

Our patented virtual SIM technology automatically connects devices to the strongest available network from 300+ carriers worldwide—no manual switching, no roaming hassles, no coverage gaps.

Through our SIMO Inside program, tablets, laptops, IoT devices, and more transform into always-connected solutions.

From field healthcare teams to construction sites to global retail operations, SIMO keeps your workforce connected wherever business takes you.

One partner. One contract. One support team. Unlimited connectivity.

Name: Wirepas
Description: Wirepas is a global leader in IoT connectivity. We provide ultra-resilient, infinitely scalable mesh networks for massive industrial and commercial deployments. We're talking about millions of devices connected, not just thousands. Our solutions match the needs of diverse industries, in smart metering, monitoring and control. We're also the first to implement NR+, the new global standard for massive IoT. Let's redefine connectivity.

Name: Ingram Micro Colombia
Description: Ingram Micro Colombia ayuda a las empresa y organizaciones a desarrollar plenamente sus procesos con la aplicación de tecnología informática, logrando maximizar el valor del uso de la tecnología en beneficio de sus clientes, cadena de valor y la sociedad en general. El enfoque en soluciones en la nube, movilidad y cadena de suministro y tecnología, permite a los socios de negocios de Ingram Micro operar de la manera más eficiente y con el mayor éxito en los mercados que atienden.

Name: Lynk
Description: Lynk is a patented, proven, and commercially licensed satellite-direct-to-standard-mobile-phone system. Today, Lynk allows commercial subscribers to send and receive text messages to and from space, via standard unmodified mobile devices. Lynk’s service has been demonstrated in over 25 countries and is currently being deployed commercially, based on 36 MNO commercial service contracts covering approximately 50 countries. Lynk is currently providing cell broadcast (emergency) alerts and two-way SMS messaging and plans to launch voice and mobile broadband services in the future. By partnering with Lynk via a simple roaming agreement, a mobile network operator opens the door to new revenue in untapped markets, gives subscribers peace of mind with ubiquitous connectivity, and provides a potential pathway to economic prosperity for billions. For more information, visit www.lynk.world.

Name: SOLiD
Description: SOLiD (http://www.solid.com/us/) enables indoor and outdoor cellular and public safety communications at many of the world's best-known and most challenging venues, including the busiest airports, subways, Fortune 500 corporate buildings, hospitals, hotels, universities, professional and college sports venues, government, industrial, and logistics facilities, as well as small and medium-sized “Middleprise” buildings. SOLiD's Distributed Antenna Systems (DAS) scale to overcome every challenge. SOLiD continuously innovates to deliver best-in-class solutions with ALLIANCE 5G DAS, SOLiD BARS, and Open RAN (O-RAN) radio solutions.  To learn more, visit www.solid.com/us/ or call 1-(888) 409-9997.

Name: CTIA
Description:
CTIA represents the U.S. wireless communications industry. From carriers and equipment manufacturers to mobile app developers and content creators, we bring together a dynamic group of companies that enable consumers to lead a 21st Century connected life.

As the voice of America’s wireless industry, CTIA:

Advocates for legislative and regulatory policies at federal, state, and local levels that foster the continued innovation, investment and increasing economic impact of America’s wireless industry. CTIA is active on a wide range of issues including spectrum policy, wireless infrastructure, and the Internet of Things, among others.

Convenes the industry to tackle our most difficult challenges and coordinates voluntary best practices and initiatives. CTIA works with members to develop test plans and certification processes for mobile devices, coordinates with members and other industry leaders to ensure the security of mobile networks and devices, and leads industry initiatives to enhance accessibility, improve 9-1-1 location accuracy, deter phone theft and encourage safe driving.

Promotes our members through numerous campaigns aimed at building awareness among policymakers and the general public, as well as through industry-leading events on topics ranging from cybersecurity to 5G.

Name: SOLEXY WIRELESS
Description:
Solexy manufactures components that optimize deployment of wireless communications and wired Ethernet in hazardous locations.
The product range consists of : 
- intrinsically safe and ex-proof barrier fittings for antennas
- intrinsically safe and ex-proof barrier couplers for ethernet
- explosion proof  I/O digital and analogue wireless modules
- explosion proof serial port (RS232-RS485) transciever
- explosion proof Modbus wireless transcievers
- explosion proof radio modems

Products are certified UL/CSA, ATEX, IECex and MSHA, according to product.

Solexy has two operations: 

Solexy headquarter, based in Desenzano del Garda (BS, Italy), that is responsible for wireless system packages and for sales in Europe, Asia, Australia, Africa and South America.

Solexy USA LLC, based in Cincinnati (Ohio, USA), that is responsible for R&D and manufacturing of the intrinsically safe couplers and antennas and for sales in the North American market.

For more information please visit: www.solexy.net

Name: airG Inc.
Description:
airG is a pioneer in the mobile software industry having released its first mobile application in 2000. Since then the company's products and services have been used by over 100 million consumers globally, generating more than $1 billion in revenues.
 
Though we have grown to be a multi-national corporation with a strong balance sheet – we remain true to our formative entrepreneurial roots. Our commercial success comes through financing our teams to take big risks – and challenging them to work in small autonomous groups to solve complex problems. Each product team is supported by seasoned sales, creative, legal, and business development teams maximizing the probability of commercial success. At airG, we are not afraid of building products that may fail – we're more afraid of missing opportunities by not trying.


To learn more about airG – our exciting job opportunities, culture, benefits and perks – go to jobs.airg.com.

Name: Azcom Technology
Description:
Azcom Technology is providing cutting-edge product engineering services to global customers for over two decades, to accelerate development of innovative products and solutions in diverse market verticals including wireless connectivity, automotive, aerospace, home automation, smart cities, and IoT. Our wireless product business unit offers a comprehensive portfolio of LTE access and core products for Private LTE markets all over the world.

Product Engineering Services
Azcom offers product engineering services across a wide range of development platforms and application domains. Our competent and experienced engineering teams provide highly specialized expertise in areas such as signal processing, DSP & FPGA programming, embedded software and system development, radar sensors, digital hardware design and RF engineering. With established processes and necessary operational structure, Azcom has successfully executed highly complex projects and turnkey product development.

Wireless Products & Solutions
Azcom Technology is one of the global leaders in LTE & 5G cellular technology development.
Azcom provides deployable 4G, NB-IoT and 3G Small Cells, Network In a Box, Single Sector Macro, Compact EPC and Remote Radio Heads for private LTE markets including CBRS.  Based on this product portfolio, we offer connectivity solutions for Industrial IoT (Mining, Agriculture, Utilities, Oil & Gas, Logistics), Smart City, Rural, Defence, Public Safety and Mission Critical applications. 

An employee-oriented approach, with focus on careers growth and development and on work-life balance, makes Azcom an informal company, an attractive workplace for talented people that are looking for expressing their creativity in a friendly environment.
We offer to candidate employees a unique opportunity to work for an Italian company while being part of a highly innovative and global environment and hence to grow your experience from both professional and human standpoints.

Name: Redpine Signals
Description: Founded in 2001 and headquartered in San Jose, California, Redpine Signals, Inc., is a wireless semiconductor and system solutions company focused on providing innovative, ultra-low power, multi-protocol products for connected world/IoT markets. Redpine Signals’ product portfolio includes SoCs, modules and devices that support dual-band 802.11n, 802.11ac Wave 2,dual-mode Bluetooth 5, 802.15.4/ZigBee/Thread, 802.11p (V2X), security processor, and embedded ARM Cortex-M4. Redpine Signals product families consist of Wireless Connectivity (n-Link & WiSeConnect), Wireless Secure MCU (WiSeMCU), and WaveCombo (V2X communication).

Name: VoCoVo
Description:
www.vocovo.com

VoCoVo combines a deep understanding of team communications with a passion for driving efficiency through technical solutions.

Description: Founded in 2005 and based in Shanghai, Huaqin Technology is the world's leading enterprise specialized in smart hardware products. Description: This is a company page for people who want to be associated with nowhere when adding a job to their profile.

Name: Firetide, Inc. - A Division of UNICOM Global
Description:
Firetide, headquartered in Silicon Valley, is the technology leader in delivering secure and reliable private broadband wireless solutions. Firetide solutions meet the stringent demands of high-definition video, voice and data applications for public safety, transportation, industrial and commercial operations. Our solutions are unrivalled in enabling customers to manage their critical infrastructures reliably, securely and with low latency. Founded in 2003, the company has more than 10,000 customers in 40 countries around the world.

Name: EnGenius Technologies
Description:
Established in 1999, EnGenius Technologies, Inc., is a US-based industry expert in wireless communications and radio frequency (RF) technology, delivering feature-rich, long-range wireless communications technology for voice and data. The versatility and performance of the company's solutions lower total cost of ownership, increase productivity and maximize return on investment.

EnGenius’ growing portfolio of networking solutions including Gigabit PoE switches, indoor and outdoor wireless networking products, and IP cameras for business deliver long-range connectivity, robust feature sets and versatility for class-leading performance at affordable price points.  

The leader in premise mobility communications, EnGenius’ cordless business telephone systems and portable handsets deliver extremely long-range and reliable connectivity outdoors, throughout multi- story buildings and in complex environments. Whether using the FreeStyl system in an office setting or the durable, scalable DuraFon system in larger, complex environments, EnGenius phone systems enhance productivity and enable mobility throughout business properties.

Our mission is to deliver best-in-class voice and data solutions that empower mobility, enhance productivity, and embrace simplicity. We believe connectivity should be reliable, feature-rich, personalized and affordable.

Name: Electronic Search, Inc.
Description:
Electronic Search, Inc. is a staffing solutions firm, in business since 1978, specializing in filling highly technical requirements in the wireless, telecommunications, and public safety technology industries.   This includes GPS/GIS, RF Technologies, Land Mobile Radio, Mobile Data, Wireless Test & Measurement, Mobile Entertainment and Media, Telecom and VoIP, Mobile Web, Mobile Search, and many other technological niches.   

Electronic Search, Inc. is a dedicated team of Recruiters, trained to expertly define and promote a company's open positions in order to expediently fill even the toughest needs.   ESI's Recruiters are consultants, that help companies solve business problems relating to hiring, whether the positions are full-time or contract, junior level to executive level.    Our services span the United States and our customers range from giant OEM's to small startups.   

Read about our successes at: www.electronicsearch.com

Name: Fon
Description:
Fontech, the technological arm of Fon, makes managing and operating WiFi smart and simple for operators and enterprises. Ao longo dos anos, a Wavecom tem vindo a usufruir de projetos cofinanciados ao abrigo dos fundos da União Europeia, que podem ser consultados em mais detalhe em www.wavecom.pt/projetos-cofinanciados

Description:

Name: ASOCS
Description:
Connecting the dots of the industrial world. ASOCS is empowering  enterprises to connect their production lines to edge applications by providing them with a cloud-based private 5G network and a scalable Software as a Service (SaaS) model.

CYRUS 5G software by ASOCS enables enterprises to run their networks on their own terms using standard hardware, just as they do with their IT infrastructure. ASOCS enables companies to easily implement private 5G networks and benefit from high network reliability, enhanced security, and low latency.

ASOCS believes that use cases are the primary concerns for companies and that technology is the enabler of the use cases such as: video and imaging AI processing, autonomous vehicle mobility, synchronized production line robotic, and real-time big data analysis. As a cloud-based software solution, CYRUS 5G software is focused on supporting real use cases in the most efficient and effective manner. CYRUS can be deployed from a Market Place and connects companies to a global community of open uses cases saving time and money in implementing and enhancing Industry 4.0 - Smart Manufacturing and AI computation.

5G is becoming the go-to technology for private networks, with enterprises, manufacturers, and system integrators implementing Private 5G in their facilities as the most efficient, manageable, and reliable method for transferring data from multiple simultaneously connected devices to and from the edge.

Being hardware agnostic and utilizing O-RAN, ASOCS 5G software offers flexibility for companies to choose and tailor the right system for their particular needs. ASOCS has partnered and integrated with global leaders in hardware and edge to make such implementation simple while offering a single pane of glass view so that the network and capacity can be managed like any other IT system.

Our range of complementary RF services and solutions includes:

INTERLLIGENT has offices both in Tel Aviv, Israel (HQ) and in the United Kingdom (since 2010). 

INTERLLIGENT UK
**********************************

With considerable experience in providing customized test equipment solutions since 2000, INTERLLIGENT has developed partnerships with an extensive and loyal list of customers for its test equipment services, including some of the biggest names in the RF and microwave industry. This heritage enables us to offer our UK customers a tailored technical and financial package to suit their exact test and measurement requirements. Our range of RF services is supported by a skilled team with extensive RF knowledge and expertise, combined with a well-established logistics infrastructure.

Name: Venture Technologies Inc
Description:
Venture Technologies is a provider of Application Specific Embedded Wireless data solutions for product developers.  We specialize in products where the market demands more than off-the-shelf modules can provide, most typically much lower cost, much lower energy consumption and/or higher network performance.

We create these solutions using a combination of our proprietary RFOS – our modular, customizable, radio platform, and our system architecture and product development capabilities.  We can also integrate standards-based approaches including Zigbee,Bluetooth Low Energy, ANT, 6LoWPAN, etc. when these are needed.  

We can develop just the electronics and embedded software or complete products including mechanical design and user interface.

Examples of our work in commercial and consumer markets include:
•	Smart-energy commercial lighting mesh network system, with very fast response
•	Smart-homes wireless HVAC controllers with 5+ year battery life
•	Supermarket cart advertizing & information system
•	Remote control dog training collar (using “invisible fence” actuator)
•	Wellhead tank level monitoring system.

Many of our client's products incorporate sensors and we have a deep capability and track record in interfacing to and controlling different sensors (drive electronics, signal conditioning, calibration, self test, etc.).

Name: GeoTraq
Description:
GeoTraq provides asset tracking and remote monitoring through Mobile IoT Modules with global connectivity. 

Equipped with the latest in NB-IoT/ LTE-M, low power positioning technology, GeoTraq modules deliver highly accurate location data for indoor and outdoor positioning. The modules are ultra-small with a plug and play form factor for easy attachment of antenna, battery and desired sensors.  Unlike most Internet of Things solutions, GeoTraq modules eliminate the need of designing and building a printed circuit board for mounting making it quicker, easier, and cost-effective for businesses to deploy IoT solutions that will create real ROI. 

GeoTraq Mobile IoT Modules can connect to external sensors to measure variables such as temperature, flow, pressure, humidity, motion, acceleration, and more. The modules report for scheduled or trigger-based events to provide the right data at the right time.

For more information, visit www.geotraq.com.

Name: Kionect
Description:
Kionect propose des objets connectés et autonomes basés sur l'internet des objets aussi appelé le Web 3.0.

Les objets connectés permettent d’apporter de l’intelligence (smart) aux villes, bâtiments, commerces, maisons et autres équipements.

Nous proposons à nos clients des services et solutions qui leurs permettent de manager leurs énergies, installations et équipements techniques. 

Notre gamme de capteurs collecte et remonte des données liées à la consommation énergétique (eau, électricité, gaz), au suivi de la qualité de l'air intérieur, au report d'informations et alarmes dans des locaux isolés ou sensibles.

Ces données sont ensuite analysées et traitées pour fournir à l'utilisateur une plateforme web qui devient alors un outil ecoresponsable et indispensable de son quotidien. La plateforme se veut évolutive, il est possible d'y raccorder tous les services proposés par Kionect.

Notre plateforme web hébergée et administrée par Kionect ne nécessite aucune installation de logiciel. Développée en responsive design, elle s’adapte automatiquement au support de connexion (PC, tablette, smartphone).

Plusieurs services, un seul outil…
Cet outil regroupe tous vos services, pour en faire un allié indispensable de votre quotidien.

Vos différents établissements sont localisés sur une carte représentant votre secteur géographique (communal, départemental, régional ou national) permettant ainsi une surveillance de vos capteurs.

BluFlux received the APEX Award for Tech Startup of the Year 2015 by the Colorado Technology Association. 

BluFlux was also selected by Google's Advanced Technologies and Products (ATAP) group as a design partner for the development of Project Soli. BluFlux contributed to the design of two different radar sensor antennas and delivered working antenna prototypes of one of the early Project Soli sensors. 

Visit http://bluflux.com for more information, to request an RF testing quotation, or to schedule a complimentary design consultation, or contact us at info@bluflux.com.

Name: HUMAVOX
Description:
Welcome to a wires-free world!

Life is now connected. More and more of our day-to-day appliances become smarter, personalized by connected to each other wirelessly to enrich and improve all aspects of our personal and professional experiences. 
Our mobile electronic devices are gradually becoming an extension of us by smoothly blending into life. We no longer 'carry' our electronic devices - we wear them. 
Now more than ever before, we generate and consume enormous amounts of data enabled by our connected devices. It impacts our decisions on all life categories - shopping, healthcare, transportation, leisure, hospitality, medicine, dining, fitness, professional skills and performance, and so much more. 
The Internet of all Things (IOT) revolution is in fast motion. It's here to stay and grow imminently. 
With the growing number of devices per person, powering these devices is posing a major problem! While we all want to own cutting edge innovation in our life, we definitely don't want to roam through life while having to carry a bouquet of tangled cords in our bag for each device we own. 

Wireless Charging has become key for the success of IOT integration into people's life!
It has to be seamless and constraints-free so we can all finally strike out "remaining power" off of our daily list of concerns and simply stop thinking of charring our devices. 

Humavox is a fast-growing company that leads the 2nd generation of wireless charging technologies. We've taken on a bold and ambitious mission - to retire the wire for good!
Humavox developed ETERNA - an elastic technology platform combining hardware and software that utilizes a proprietary radio frequency (RF) solution that enables seamless charging of any electronic device, regardless to its size or shape. Humavox technology allows for true blending of wireless charging into everyday life, making device charging seamless and intuitive so the vision of IOT can materialize - hassles-free!

Description:

To do this, sellers need access to relevant information to inform their decision-making. 

AMZScout offers the most accurate product research tools for Amazon with a Web App and Chrome browser extension, giving you detailed sales and market data for any product or niche category. Using AMZScout’s collection of services, Amazon sellers can utilise a plethora of information to formulate better strategies, helping them beat the competition and capture the market. 

From sales volumes and profit margins to keyword rankings and niche reports, use the right information to target the most lucrative products.

Name: Simpulse
Description:
Simpulse offers embedded Software-Defined Radio (SDR) solutions for innovative professional communication systems. Simpulse’s radio links are the answer to professional applications that operate in highly mobile conditions and require a power-optimized, robust and secure solution.

We push the limits of current communication system design thanks to the scalable and programmable PULSAR SDR technology that offers a high level of flexibility and integration, and to advanced signal processing algorithms that improve robustness in presence of interferences and mobile channels.

Simpulse's flagship product, the SL200 mobile data-link modem, is dedicated to very long-range and highly mobile data transmissions. We also offer custom SDR modems that serve a great variety of specialized radio links. Typical applications include data and video radio links for various usages in drones, UAVs, robots, IoT concentrators, transportation, aerospace, public safety and defense.

Name: MainLab Ingeniería
Description:
Nos enfocamos en desarrollar soluciones mediante el monitoreo en tiempo real para procesos y equipamiento, de manera inteligente, a través de IoT y RFID, permitiendo alertar, mediante llamadas telefónicas, emails y SMS, si una variable se sale del rango normal de operación, pudiendo además realizar trazabilidad y analítica de datos.

Nos gusta ayudar a nuestros clientes a mantener sus procesos críticos monitoreados, de manera que puedan tomar decisiones rápidas, efectivas y en tiempo real, con información accesible desde cualquier parte. No hay nada mejor que evitar problemas antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

Hemos ayudado a vacunatorios, laboratorios, farmacias, clínicas, entre otros, a monitorear y regular sus procesos, normalizando los rangos de funcionamiento y evitando grandes fluctuaciones, permitiéndoles generar eficiencias, reducir variabilidades y costos.

Te podemos ayudar con:

+ Asesoramiento para identificación de variables a monitorear.
+ Monitoreo en tiempo real de variables de procesos.
+ Sistema de alarmas para variables fuera de rango operacional.
+ Seguimiento en ruta de temperatura y humedad.
+ Gestión de activos mediante RFID y RTLS.
+ Analítica de datos.

Nos encantaría trabajar contigo, contáctanos.

info@mainlab.cl

Name: TechNovator
Description:
TechNovator is pioneering a breakthrough in wireless energy transfer by harnessing the principles of quantum mechanics.
TechNovator is an innovative wireless charging technology based on the principles of energy quantization. This method of energy transfer leverages the creation of discrete energy packets, which enables the efficient transfer of energy over large volumes with up to 95% efficiency. Technovator technology is unique in that it operates without the need for magnetic or electric fields, does not produce emission or interference, and generates no heat. This enables the wireless charging of both low and high-power devices at a distance with high efficiency. 

At TechNovator, we are eliminating cables, idle time, and charging constraints to create a world where energy flows freely, instantly, and wirelessly. Our Quantum Charging technology redefines power delivery, enabling seamless, over-the-air energy transfer that keeps devices, vehicles, and entire industries in constant motion—no plugs, no waiting, just uninterrupted power. By harnessing the principles of quantum mechanics, we are accelerating the transition to a fully electrified, always-on economy, making energy more accessible, sustainable, and efficient. 
Our solutions enhance connectivity and productivity for individuals and businesses alike, ensuring that power is always available, wherever and whenever it's needed. 
The future is frictionless, limitless, and powered by TechNovator.

Name: RSI Video Technologies
Description:
RSI Video Technologies est une entreprise française créée en 2000 à Strasbourg. Elle développe, fabrique et commercialise des systèmes d’alarmes sans fil à levée de doute vidéo pour résoudre les problèmes de sécurité pour des applications commerciales, résidentielles et extérieures. La commercialisation des produits se fait sous la marque Videofied. Videofied = video verified (levée de doute vidéo). 

L’entreprise française possède un savoir-faire unique : elle est la seule à intégrer une caméra et des LED dans un détecteur infrarouge sans fil tout en fonctionnant sur piles, permettant une levée de doute 100% sans fil. . En cas de détection d'intrusion, les détecteurs/caméras MotionViewers enregistrent une vidéo de 10 secondes, immédiatement transmise au centre de télésurveillance. L'opérateur analyse la vidéo et, en cas d'intrusion avérée, adapte les moyens à mettre en œuvre et coordonne l'intervention avec les forces de l'ordre. En France, en cas de signal d'alarme reçue par un centre de télésurveillance, il est désormais obligatoire, sous peine d'une amende de 450 €, de détenir une preuve visuelle de l'effraction avant d'alerter les forces de l'ordre. 

Proposés en France  par les plus grands fournisseurs de systèmes de sécurité comme les banques ou les assurances, et par les sociétés de télésurveillance, les produits de  RSI Video Technologies ont fait leurs preuves depuis plusieurs  années  avec  des  milliers  de  systèmes installés.

Les produits sont conformes aux certifications suivantes : SO TS 16949, OHSAS 18001, ISO 9001:2000, et également la norme française NFA2P, et les normes internationales de sécurité : CE agreement (Europe), EN50131-Grade2(Europe), Asie : IDA (Singapore), A-Tick (Australie), USA : UL and FCC.

Name: Ste Industries
Description:
WHERE WE COME FROM
Ste Industries has inherited 40 years of experience and expertise in designing and delivering hardware for data transmission from STE, an Italian-based company founded in 1968; it is its natural evolution, bringing its distinctive capability and technology into IoT.
New investors and managers saw this opportunity and joined Ste Industries in 2016, giving it all the resources it needs to support a new, ambitious program of growth.
Based on these values, today Ste Industries is building a modern and innovative structure aimed at creating unique and distinctive products and solutions.
We are experts in managing radio frequency communication systems.
Our patented ultra-low energy, unidirectional, short-range communication protocol is the result of years of commitment and expertise in the field.

OUR PROPRIETARY TECHNOLOGY: THE MICRO.SP TECHNOLOGY
Micro.sp technology, patented by Ste Industries, is based on short RF pulses transmitted using Pulse Position Modulation (PPM), which guarantees high RF peak power, required for radio link reliability, but with very low average power (Power Density) and consequently low current absorption during the transmission period.
Micro.sp is recognized as a key enabling technology for short range communication systems.
The Micro.sp transmitter enables the delivery of innovative applications because of its compact design, unique wireless protocol, and ultra-low power communication system.
With Micro.sp technology, it is possible to convert cabled sensors for use in wireless applications, among other options.
Micro.sp broadens expectations to possibilities that were previously unthinkable or economically unfeasible.

OUR VISION
To enable the efficient collection of useful data from a wide range of objects.

OUR MISSION
We develop, promote and sell best-in-class, energy efficient, compact wireless solutions for collecting data.

Name: Steinwurf
Description:
Steinwurf was founded in 2011 and develops data communication components and systems leveraging erasure correcting codes. We utilize both traditional erasures codes such as Reed-Solomon and the next generation erasure code called Random Linear Network Coding (RLNC).


Erasure correcting codes can increase the reliability of communications and storage systems by restoring lost data through sophisticated mathematics. This technology is commonly used in satellite communication, distributed storage optimization, and local live video streaming.


We offer fast software implementations of erasure correcting codes and consult for their integration into, and (re)design of, communication protocols and systems. Additionally, we provide network protocols utilizing erasure correcting codes, e.g. providing reliable multicast.

Name: Dent IoT
Description:
Innovatie door IoT sinds 2016 

Bij Dent IoT ontwerpen, ontwikkelen én leveren we slimme IoT-oplossingen die je inzicht geven om processen efficiënter, sneller en foutloos te laten verlopen. Of je nu op zoek bent naar direct inzetbare producten of op maat gemaakte systemen: wij bieden oplossingen die digitalisering tastbaar en eenvoudig toepasbaar maken.

Wat doen wij?
 Dent IoT Engineering – Van RET tot Heineken en KPN, we zijn de IoT-partner voor bedrijven die assets en/of producten online willen brengen. Onze diensten helpen je bij het ontwikkelen en online brengen van slimme apparaten en sensornetwerken die jouw processen versnellen en verbeteren.
Onze missie is helder: processen slimmer maken door verspilling op te sporen en automatisering mogelijk te maken met verbonden sensoren. Dit zorgt ervoor dat jij betere beslissingen kunt maken en operaties efficiënter verlopen.

Hoe doen we dit?
 Kant-en-klare producten die direct inzetbaar zijn – Onze IoT-oplossingen zijn direct beschikbaar om snel waarde toe te voegen aan jouw werkstromen. Van slimme sensoren tot complete netwerken, je kunt meteen aan de slag zonder uitgebreide implementatietrajecten.

 Semi-maatwerk met Xguard – Staat jouw oplossing er niet tussen? Met Dent Xguard bieden we een flexibele blauwdrukoplossing die de ontwikkeling van je IoT-oplossing aanzienlijk versnelt. We zijn druk bezig de puntjes op de printplaat te zetten... dus binnenkort meer over Xguard!

 Maatwerk – In het geval dat Xguard niet aansluit op jouw wensen, kunnen we het ontwerp compleet omgooien, resulterend in een stukje hardware dat helemaal toegespitst is op jouw business. Het is dan technisch gezien geen maatwerk, maar je krijgt wel een oplossing die 100% op maat is! Dit betekent dat een combinatie van printplaat, sensoren, batterijen en casing helemaal voor jou op maat gemaakt wordt. Wanneer dit nodig is, zullen we je ondersteunen met een IP-rating, CE-keurmerk en productie.

Klaar om jouw assets online te brengen?

Name: GEBOA SA
Description:
GEBOA SA, société suisse spécialisée en IoT depuis 2004, développe et commercialise des solutions innovantes relatives à la géolocalisation, la sécurité et l'internet des objets.

L’internet des objets est issu de la convergence des technologies sans fil, des capteurs du monde réel et d'internet.

L’IoT constitue ainsi la troisième révolution numérique, après les télécommunications et l'internet, en permettant l’interaction entre le monde digital et le monde physique, entre un humain et un objet et de machine à machine.

L’IoT permet de mieux prévoir, réguler et optimiser des facettes de plus en plus nombreuses de l’activité humaine dans des domaines aussi variés que les villes, les entreprises, le transport ou l’environnement.

Parce que l'IoT peut être synonyme de complexité, nous proposons des produits et des solutions simples, adaptés aux usages de chacun, quel que soit son niveau de connaissance des objets connectés. 

Cela va de la protection du travailleur isolé à la gestion de flotte, en passant par le suivi des colis et la gestion de la chaîne du froid.

Name: Machine-Type wireless Communications Group
Description:
Machine-type wireless communication (MTC), in especial massive MTC and Ultra-reliable, low latency communication (URLLC), imposes the most challenging requirements in terms of latency and reliability that are not attended by current technologies. Hence imposing a new technological paradigm on the design of wireless networks.

MTC covers heterogeneous and stringent requirements ranging from massive connectivity up to ultra-reliability and low latency (as 99.999% within 1ms). Therefore MTC is one of the key enablers of the Internet of Things (IoT)revolution, which is predicted to change not only the way we live, but generate new business with huge potential economic impact, and revolutionize the complete value chain of several industries.

To meet this vision our group is composed of brilliant researchers that seek elegant mathematical and algorithmic solutions for MTC, mMTC and URLLC, within its diverse and heterogeneous requirements and applications.

Name: 天音通信有限公司
Description:
天音通信有限公司（以下简称“天音通信”）于1996年12月正式创立，经过近18年的持续发展，现已形成三大产业集团：传统分销产业集团、移动互联产业集团和虚拟运营产业集团。其中，分销产业集团是中国最大的移动电话综合服务商之一，移动互联产业集团是中国最具潜力的移动互联网企业之一，虚拟运营产业集团则为中国首批移动通信虚拟运营商。
 
公司目前拥有正式员工八千余名，在中国大陆地区设立了24个分公司、98个办事处、560个营销服务片区，直接覆盖并服务中国大陆5万家零售店，打造了中国规模最大的集分销、零售、售后服务、移动互联网、移动通信虚拟运营为一体的综合服务网络，其中，移动互联产业板块的塔读文学位列中国移动阅读前三强，欧朋浏览器为中国手机浏览器前四强。
公司2013年实现营业收入367亿元人民币。从2004年开始连续11年进入中国企业500强，2014年在中国500强企业中位列第395位，在中国服务企业500强中名列第128位。多次被评为最佳雇主企业。
 
公司秉承“客户至上，恒守诚信，以人为本，持续创新”的价值观，发扬“激情、协同、高效、执行”的企业精神，坚持“经营战略、经营员工、经营客户”的经营理念，公司未来的发展战略清新明确：以传统分销业务为基础，从渠道向网络和平台转变，打造B2B和平台商业模式，做强做大分销业务；以创新业务为抓手，整合运营商、厂商和零售商资源，全面提升综合服务能力，发展和突破移动通信虚拟运营业务；以浏览器为引擎，聚合产品和服务，构建移动互联平台，将客户变用户，扩大发展移动互联业务。
 
在未来3-5年时间内，努力将天音通信打造成为中国最卓越的移动互联综合服务商和中国第四大移动通信运营商。

Name: Intelligent Delivery - Hapiick
Description:
La irrupción del e-commerce como fórmula de compra provoca una demanda creciente de logística asociada a la entrega de paquetes al consumidor. Las entregas en domicilio son dificultosas para el operador logístico con un porcentaje importante ( 1 de cada 4) de intentos fallidos en la entrega lo que representa una incomodidad y un hándicap importante con los horarios y el ritmo de vida actual .

Se propone “hapiick” como un servicio innovador para paliar esta situación que afecta a un número importante de usuarios que compran por internet .La solución consiste en la instalación de unos puntos de recogida equipados con armarios automatizados y telegestionados mediante un aplicativo que facilita el control y operación de los agentes implicados en los  procesos de venta on line, entrega y recepción, es decir Tiendas On line, compañías logísticas y consumidor.La ubicación y entorno son elementos clave en el servicio ; Ubicados en lugares estratégicos de fácil acceso, con un horario amplio, arropados de un entorno de seguridad, comodidad y privacidad. Ejemplos son los supermercados urbanos o estaciones de servicio de ciudad.

Operativamente el funcionamiento es muy simple; el consumidor recibe un aviso en el que se informa que su paquete está disponible para su recogida, incluyendo una clave que facilita su identificación y acceso a la taquilla en la que está depositado su compra.

La funcionalidad base de los armarios permiten desarrollar diferentes modelos de servicio y explotación agrupados de forma genérica en operaciones B2C  y C2C.
Por ultimo señalar que la solución habilita una alternativa dentro de la problemática de la entrega de paquetería especialmente complicada en zonas urbanas con restricciones o congestión de tráfico, al agrupar los envíos y facilitar su recepción.

Name: Cognian Technologies
Description:
Cognian is the creator of the game changing Syncromesh wireless technology solution for Smart Buildings. Syncromesh is a scalable, secure, reliable wireless technology, that breaks through limitations of traditional wireless systems, and creates an intelligent fabric that enables human-centred infrastructure.

Syncromesh is bi-directional, and interoperable, enabling third parties to retrofit their existing building control equipment. In lighting, Syncromesh is compatible with standard lights and DALI dimmable lighting. Syncromesh enables sensing and control for building environments and creates a Syncromesh canopy for tracking beacons.
Once deployed, Syncromesh becomes the 'Smart Canopy' for the built space - now allowing many otherwise siloed systems to integrate, inter-operate and exchange data and control signals between each other and traditional or contemporary management systems. Many clients are now pressing for the next phase, being "Smart Canopy as a Service" (SCaaS), which allows building Owners, Manager and Tenants to leverage these capabilities in a Cloud-like way - consumption-based, elastic, evergreen and hyper-scale.
Cognian, with Syncromesh and SaaS, is Building Intelligence.

Name: SenseNet Inc.
Description:
Located in Vancouver, SenseNet stands at the forefront of tech innovation, delivering cutting-edge, data-driven solutions specifically tailored for IoT applications. Our current emphasis? Early wildfire detection.

Our unwavering mission: Shield communities from the devastating impacts of wildfires. We achieve this through bespoke hardware and software, harnessing a myriad of gas sensors for in-forest data collection, and utilizing state-of-the-art AI algorithms for cloud-based data processing.

What sets SenseNet apart is our strategic fusion of low power wide area networks, advanced 5G communication, and seamless IoT connectivity, ensuring effortless deployment across both remote and urban landscapes.

At the heart of SenseNet lies our sophisticated sensor network, bolstered by AI algorithms, expansive data analytics, and intuitive visualization dashboards. We transform raw data into actionable insights, presenting them to wildfire authorities via user-friendly web and mobile interfaces.

Our pioneering solutions have birthed two flagship products:

Tailored communication hardware and 5G-integrated sensors for expansive wildfire surveillance.
A holistic web and mobile platform for data representation, fire risk assessment, and prompt wildfire alerts.
Every SenseNet innovation is steeped in environmental stewardship. We're committed to not just mitigating environmental threats but also reducing greenhouse gas emissions, ensuring compliance, championing forest conservation, and elevating overall environmental performance.

Gazing into the future, SenseNet envisions broadening its horizons, targeting avant-garde, data-centric solutions encompassing areas like smart homes, pollution control, oil and gas leak detection, dam surveillance, and greenhouse oversight.

Tag-N-Trac provides a full-stack IoT solution, integrating various hardware and software technologies. All solutions are developed in-house with proprietary IP. The company provides tracking solutions for all types of logistics units, from large assets such as containers and trailers to small items such as pallets and cargo boxes. The product portfolio includes a range of hardware devices designed for different transport modes and use cases. The company has developed the Smart Labels, which are disposable labels that use Bluetooth or cellular technologies.  

In 2023, Tag-N-Trac introduced RELATIVITY, a modular SaaS platform that provides real-time visibility and traceability into an asset's location and condition. The online platform is device and sensor-agnostic, giving visibility for Tag-N-Trac and third-party devices and sensors. Relativity includes intuitive dashboards, custom reporting, alerts, a rules engine, and analytics designed to improve operational performance. Relativity is designed to easily integrate with customers' existing ERP, WMS, TMS, and other IT systems. Tag-N-Trac serves global customers within the pharmaceutical and logistics industries
