MyEli est 100% personnalisable, il deviendra votre allié du quotidien pour ne jamais être seule face à une agression.

 Designé et assemblé en France.

- Société liquidé le 26 juillet 2023 -

Name: BearCom Canada
Description:
BearCom designs and delivers high-performance wireless voice, video and data communication solutions that boost operating efficiency and increase safety. Whether you need a multi-point wireless network to connect your work teams, an integrated two-way radio system to add productivity across your facility, a bi-directional amplifier to enable communications between first responders, a video surveillance system to protect people and property, or any other wireless solution to improve team collaboration, BearCom can help.

For more than 40 years, BearCom has been serving leading airlines, manufacturing and petrochemical plants, distribution centres, hotels and resorts, construction firms, public safety agencies, schools, and more. In addition, our rentals team supports major sporting events, award shows, conventions, and fairs, as well as the largest music festivals in North America.

BearCom Canada was launched when many of the country’s leading Motorola Solutions and Kenwood two-way radio dealers joined the BearCom family. The following legacy companies form the core of BearCom’s Canadian operations and growth strategies: Vector Communications, Mobile Business Communications, Communications Group Red Deer, Spectrum Communications, and Turris Communications.

BearCom sells, rents, and services two-way radios, radio interoperability systems, IP video surveillance cameras, mesh broadband networks, point-to-point bridges, remote call boxes, WLAN systems, and more. Over 30,000 customers depend on BearCom to keep them connected... everywhere, all the time. When working with BearCom, you’re partnering with a wireless solutions provider who knows your sector, and provides the wireless voice, video, and data solutions you need to be successful.

Name: Mobyle Engage
Description: Mobyle Engage stands above the rest as the first company to provide culturally relevant mobile services and solutions for nomadic subscribers. Our mobile monetization solutions are developed and customized to consumers based on their country’s local idiosyncrasy.  Leveraging our network of connections to mobile network operators, our proprietary technology, our team of intercultural professionals and our ability to adapt and innovate at a fast pace. We have become a leader in the industry and a force that embraces innovation, collaboration and performance.

Name: ioXt Alliance
Description: The ioXt Alliance, the global standard for IoT security, is a group of manufacturers, industry alliances and government organizations dedicated to harmonizing best security practices and establishing testable standards that give retailers and consumers product confidence in a highly connected world.

Name: RG2i
Description:
RG2I vous accompagne dans le choix de solutions IoT et M2M pour l'acquisition, la transmission et l'analyse de données.

ACQUISITION DE DONNEES : 

- Large gamme de capteurs sans fil Lorawan, Sigfox, WMBus... (température, humidité, impulsions, mesures de courant, niveau, vanne thermostatique...)
- Architecture privée (réseau local) ou publique (opérateur IoT)
- E/S déportées tertiaires (ModbusRTU, BACnetIP, MBus, Lon) et industrielles (ModbusRTU ou TCP, CANopen...).

COMMUNICATION INDUSTRIELLE ET TRANSPORT DE DONNÉES : 

- Passerelles pour la conversion de protocoles entre différents équipements
- Transmetteurs d'alarmes SMS/MAIL/VOCAL
- Datalogger
- Modems/routeurs 3G ou 4G
- Routeur VPN pour la télémaintenance
- Passerelle IIoT pour la collecte de données process (multi-protocoles)

ANALYSE ET EXPLOITATION DES DONNÉES :  

- Outils de reporting (énergétique, maintenance, alarmes...) pour l'exploitation de données
- Plateforme d'hypervision IoT/M2M pour le monitoring d'un parc d'équipements distants, en temps réel

Solutions techniques standards et évolutives, adaptées à tous les secteurs d’activité (industrie, tertiaire, villes, transport…)

Name: Awabot | | Telepresence with Beam
Description:
Awabot is a global leader in telepresence robotics, with 15+ years of experience designing, deploying, and supporting remote-presence solutions worldwide. We build Beam robots with robust hardware, regular software updates, and repairability to ensure longevity and sustainability.

Our mission? To strengthen social and professional bonds and create immersive experiences that bring people together—whether in education, work, healthcare, or cultural and social settings. Through flagship programs like TED‑i (led by the French Ministry of Education), thousands of robots have been deployed in schools, hospitals, and institutions, enabling students, patients, and professionals to participate fully—even remotely.

We collaborate with leading organizations across corporate, academic, and public sectors to design large-scale telepresence deployments, ensuring inclusion, accessibility, and meaningful human presence.

Key figures & values:
 200,000+ users worldwide
 8,000+ Beam units deployed
 15+ years of telepresence expertise

 Ready to create immersive remote presence and strengthen social & professional ties? Book a demo: https://awabot.com/en/demo/

Name: Wandering WiFi
Description: Wandering WiFi brings together Internet of Things (IoT) managed services with wireless expertise to deliver secure, user friendly, and innovative monitoring solutions.   With our Enterprise Managed Services, organizations can easily develop, deploy, monitor, and support devices across multiple mobile platforms and operating systems. Services include hardware procurement, development and API integration, data capture and analytics, and 24/7/365 monitoring and support. Acquired by Alan Dabbiere in February 2016, Wandering Wifi is based in Atlanta and can be found online at www.wanderingwifi.com.

Name: RFID Global by Softwork | RFID, NFC e Bluetooth Low Energy
Description:
Distributore a valore aggiunto di tecnologie RFID attive e passive, NFC e Bluetooth Low Energy, RFID Global - Business Unit del Gruppo Softwork, è focalizzata sul layer fisico di queste auto-ID technology, interagendo con il canale trade (software house, system integrator, ICT, istituti di ricerca ed università).

Tra i brand distribuiti, FEIG Electronic (RFID passivo), Chainway (mobile device), Toshiba Tec (stampanti), Alien Technology (transponder), RedWave (dispositivi RFID da noi progettati su moduli FEIG) e BluEpyc (Business Unit del Gruppo Softwork, progetta sistemi Bluetooth LE).

A corredo delle architetture hardware RFID e Bluetooth Low Energy, RFID Global crea valore aggiunto nei servizi, che affiancano il Partner lungo il processo di acquisizione competenza, analisi della soluzione migliore e sua implementazione.

Completano il carnet di servizi l'RFID & BLE Testing Center e le proposte educational (seminari free e corsi executive on demand).


Business Unit of Softwork Group, RFID Global is a value-added distributor of RFID, NFC & Bluetooth Low Energy technologies, targeting trade operators (Software House, System Integrator, IT Company, OEM, University etc.). 
Our product and service range:
- complete RFID architectures - physical layer, also for customized applications: tag/transponder, antenna, controller, device, mobile solution, communication interface, API, SW library, development kit, etc., as well as ISO and EPC standard. 
- Consulting & Support for feasibility studies.

Name: Ligado Networks
Description: Making connections is Ligado’s core mission. Our vision is to modernize American infrastructure by connecting the Industrial Internet of Things. With our current state-of-the-art satellite technology and plans to deploy Custom Private Networks for the businesses that keep this country running, we’re paving the way for future innovations.

Name: WATTECO
Description:
Watteco is a French company specializing in the design, manufacturing, and commercialization of data measurement sensors. These sensors transmit data over long-range, low-bandwidth, and low-power radio networks (LPWAN), including both private and public LoRaWAN infrastructures.
With recognized expertise in the design, development, industrialization, and production of electronic devices, Watteco addresses key segments of the Internet of Things (IoT) market: Smart Industry, Smart Building, Smart City, and Smart Metering. The company also provides advanced solutions compliant with ATEX standards, suitable for use in hazardous and explosive environments.
Driven by a constant commitment to meeting our customers' needs, Watteco supports its clients throughout every stage of their project—from identifying use cases and recommending appropriate solutions, to training, installation support, and commissioning.
To simplify the deployment of our sensors, we’ve developed a comprehensive set of tools, including user guides, video tutorials, a dedicated support website, and more. Our product portfolio continues to expand to meet evolving industry demands and new use cases.

Name: ANYFIELDS
Description:
Created to support a more efficient and affordable wireless connectivity, ANYFIELDS developed a new kind of antenna testing tools. 

Our EMBox and EMCam use an unique multi patented technology of infrared thermography born at French ONERA lab to measure and visualize in high definition the radiation of all antennas in one click for an instant performance diagnostic.

Accessible, agile and efficient, ANYFIELDS solutions will enable the next wireless innovations, reduce development times and improve industrial processes in strategic fast-growing mobile industries from space to telecom, transportation, drones, IOT…

Name: 802 NETWORKS
Description:
802 Networks is a value added distributor with an enthusiastic Belgian team of experienced wireless network professionals. The entire 802 Networks team were all part of the Blue Vision Telecom family and have been in the wireless business for more than 10 years. We are located in Belgium with a focus on the Benelux market, but also carry out assignments in the rest of the world. Our team is very dynamic and will always strive to find the best solution for the end customer.

802 Networks focuses on wireless solutions and services and can help you with all your wireless needs. All our products are handpicked and thoroughly tested by our expert wireless engineers. This way we can guarantee and vouch for the quality and reliability of our entire product portfolio. We also provide high level solutions for networking, security and storage & servers as well.

As a service driven company we are at your disposal for the correct hardware and the corresponding knowledge of all the products. In addition, we are able to carry out the installation for resellers and take care of back to back support contracts. If you would like more information about our service driven approach, please do not hesitate to contact us or visit our offices in Kontich.

Name: Parsec Antennas
Description:
Parsec Antennas designs and manufactures high-performance, ruggedized 5G antennas tailored for mobile, enterprise, PLTE, and IoT applications. Proudly made in the USA , our antennas are engineered to deliver exceptional connectivity and reliability in the most demanding environments. With a commitment to innovation and quality, Parsec Antennas empowers seamless communication and robust network performance across various industries, including government, defense, public safety, and industrial sectors. 

Discover the difference with Parsec Antennas—where cutting-edge technology meets American craftsmanship.

Name: eleven-x
Description: eleven-x is an industry leading IoT and Smart City technology company focused on improving the parking experience for all with its award-winning, smart parking technology solution, eXactpark. The solution helps cities and institutions successfully address mobility challenges by enabling drivers to find available parking fast while delivering industry-leading 99.5% accuracy and 24/7 data to support improved parking policies. eXactpark’s comprehensive software platform and patented SPS-X sensor, help reduce traffic, improve safety and lower GHG emissions. The solution is being utilized by cities and institutions across North America, including Arlington County, VA; Kirkland, WA; The Town of Oakville, Ontario and the University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee. For more information please visit eleven-x.com.

Name: Antenova
Description:
Antenova is a leading provider of high performing standard antennas and radio antenna modules for wireless M2M and consumer electronic devices. Antenova's market proven gigaNOVA range of standard antennas and RADIONOVA RF antenna solutions are ideally suited for a broad range of wireless connectivity requirements. Don't miss our newer lamiiANT antennas made from FR4 materials, flexiiANT flexible antennas and our ceriiANT antenna family - some of the smallest antennas in the world.  We offer  antennas for GSM, CDMA, 3G, 4G, LTE, GPS, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, ISM, WiMAX,  ZigBee and FM, etc.

Antenova also offers matching, integration and test services to ensure the best possible performing antenna solutions for customer devices and systems. For further information, please visit www.antenova.com. 

Please see our latest vacancies at https://www.antenova.com/careers/

Name: Sigma Connectivity WSI AB
Description:
We can help you with the entire process of creating a new connected product or service, or with just part of the process. We have a deep understanding of what makes a product work, both from a business and technical perspective and we can choose from our wide network of best-in-class partners to create a development dream team for your solution.
In our state-of-the-art laboratories and chambers, we can develop physical products.

Name: Valmont Site Pro 1
Description:
We’re the backbone of modern connectivity.
Providing critical infrastructure, enhancing connectivity.

We are telecom's premier manufacturer and distributor of wireless site components.

You need it fast? We've got you covered.

Our nationwide warehouses are fully stocked and strategically located around the U.S. to facilitate the immediate shipment of your order. With the addition of our latest locations, we reach 99% of the U.S. within a single day. 

Quality you would expect from Valmont.

Engineered and manufactured to exacting tolerances with comprehensive quality control processes in place, our products are the best quality available anywhere. Period. We build with the contractor in mind; our parts are securely packaged, safe to use, and easy to install.

We're constantly innovating. It's part of who we are.
Our engineering and product development teams belong to
all prominent telecommunication trade organizations and have a keen eye on new developments and changes to the industry. This foresight enables us to remain at the cutting edge of new developments and challenges, allowing us to provide efficient, cost-effective new technologies that solve our customers’ unique challenges.

With us, you're first.

Everything we do is with our customers in mind, and providing an optimal experience is our top priority. Whether purchasing through our knowledgeable customer service team or our fast and secure website online, we guarantee that you will have a first-class experience.

Name: Location Labs by Avast
Description:
Location Labs is the global pioneer in mobile security for humans. Acquired by Avast in 2016, our services are used by more than 1.3 million monthly paying subscribers worldwide. We were named one of Entrepreneur magazine’s “most brilliant” companies and TechCrunch said we’ve “cracked the code” for mobile monetization. 

We continue to operate independently and are growing fast, with plans to increase our 150+-person team by 50% in the coming year.

Name: BlackGPS
Description:
En BlackGPS, estamos dedicados a transformar la gestión de flotas en Latinoamérica mediante tecnología de vanguardia. Nuestro enfoque está en maximizar la rentabilidad de las empresas a través del análisis detallado del performance de conductores, control de combustible, gestión eficiente de mantenciones y reparaciones, y sistemas avanzados de videovigilancia.

Entendemos que cada detalle cuenta en el negocio del transporte. Por eso, proporcionamos herramientas que permiten a nuestros clientes tomar decisiones informadas, mejorando la seguridad, eficiencia y sostenibilidad de sus operaciones.

Con un equipo comprometido y una visión clara, en BlackGPS no solo ofrecemos soluciones tecnológicas, sino que también acompañamos a nuestros clientes en su camino hacia el éxito. Ya sea que estés gestionando una flota pequeña o una operación a gran escala, nuestro objetivo es el mismo: ayudarte a alcanzar resultados óptimos y llevar tu negocio al siguiente nivel.
Location: Lo Barnechea, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Mercku
Description:
At Mercku, our mission is to empower homes and businesses with future-proof, innovative products and lead the industry towards truly autonomous homes and businesses. Backed by decades of wireless networking expertise and an award-winning design team, we offer a full suite of connectivity solutions ranging from design routers to cloud-based solutions, and integrations with industry-leading technology.

We are laying the groundwork for home and office connectivity with our line of award-winning mesh Wi-Fi solutions, including the M6 – named Networking Product of the Year by the world-renowned Consumer Technology Association. Our robust 360-degree remote management suite empowers end-users and businesses alike, delivering you insights and secure smart home monitoring.

Pushing the boundaries of home automation even further, we created Mercku Wireless Intelligent Sensing, or WISe for short. By leveraging mmWave technology, we’ve found a way to accurately monitor the slightest changes in your home to provide you with insights without the use of wearables or implants – true remote monitoring.

The future of connectivity starts with you – Mercku simplifies it.

Name: Access Marketing
Description: Manufacturer sales representative company offering aerospace, avionics, RF, land mobile radio, fiber / ethernet, network, and wireless solutions to clients in Kansas, Missouri, Iowa, Nebraska, South Dakota, North Dakota, Minnesota, Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, and Arkansas.

Name: CanGo Networks (a VIAVI Solutions Company)
Description: CanGo Networks, a VIAVI Solutions Company; is a leader in Cloud Native Inventory, Real Time 5G Assurance, AI and ML driven Analytics and Network Automation Solutions on Google Cloud empowers Operators to evolve their Legacy NOC to Dark NOC as part of their Digital OSS Transformation Journey. Leveraging CanGo's OSS Suite helps Network Operations, Planning, Optimization and NOC/SOC Teams to have an Ultimate End-to-End Network Visibility across Cloud, Mobility, IT/MEC and IoT Platforms.

Name: IT Visionary
Description:
IT Visionary is a technology and business consulting company that offers a wide range of solutions to satisfy the business needs of organizations to run intelligently and accelerate their digital transformation journey. Intelligent technologies deliver game-changing business outcomes.

IT Visionary helps organizations to use the latest intelligent technologies such as IOT, RPA, AI, Big Data Analytics and re-engineer and optimize their business processes to sustain their business development especially in the competitive and uncertain economy we live in right now, drive resilience, profitability and sustainable growth.

Meanwhile, our aim is to provide a more sustainable future for those generations to come. By boosting the use of cloud computing and intelligent technology, we are assisting in sustaining our environment by reducing energy consumption, waste and carbon emissions. Cloud computing and intelligent technologies are not just new technologies; they are the solution to save our future.

Name: Luceor
Description:
For organizations with specialized connectivity needs, Luceor’s products simplify decision making and enable the best combination of coverage, bandwidth, privacy, security and price.
Luceor’s highly adaptive technology provides smart access to a mixture of network options so that resilient and uninterrupted connectivity can happen anywhere, anytime.  

With over 450 deployments for emergency systems, major events and military applications in 15 different countries, Luceor is a global leader in specialized connectivity applications. More than 100 cities, federal governments, and corporations trust Luceor with their mission critical network needs.  
For mission critical needs we do the following:
- Ensure that events security has private and critical communication without interruption.
- Conduct video surveillance so that police and other responders have critical and reliable real time data while on the go.
- Help ensure secure communication to protect critical sites, even in harsh environments or at the spur of the moment and for emergencies. 
- Better ensure communications security and connectivity for mobile infrastructure in large cities (ports, tramways, warehouses, etc.).
- For Military and Defense, ensure uninterrupted connection coverage that is very secure and very private, whenever and wherever needed.

Name: WITRAC
Description:
WITRAC helps companies be more efficient and competitive thanks to innovative technological solutions that connect and give visibility to the value chain of its clients.

Able to identify, locate, measure and control wirelessly and in real time, any asset, anywhere, WITRAC fabricates its own hardware and software based on the IoT and AI technology, in order to satisfy the industry's tracing needs. 

Its digitalization and automatization solutions combine multiple connectivity devices and protocols with a management platform, in order to generate data and transform it into useful information and valuable insights.

Please visit http://www.witrac.io/ or email us at info@witrac.es for more info.

Name: NEWRACOM
Description:
NEWRACOM is a leading developer and licensor of wireless intellectual property to accelerate the cutting-edge technology of connectivity innovation. We provide a broad range of Wi-Fi (802.11ah and 802.11b/g/n/ac) IPs that covers various connectivity needs in our lives. With our extensive and diverse Wi-Fi IP portfolio, we enable customers to do what we call “one-stop shopping,” giving a comprehensive solution that can serve multiple applications including mobile devices, wearables, digital home, home automation, healthcare, and industrial automation. 

We are partnered with numerous world’s leading fabless semiconductor companies, consumer electronic device manufacturers, and IoT/ M2M device manufacturers to help them incorporate customized WLAN functionalities into their systems in highly profitable and cost-effective manners. 

Headquartered in Orange County, California and also located in Seoul, South Korea, we are well prepared to promptly respond to the demands from all around the world, and to deliver the right wireless connectivity solutions to help our customers’ businesses grow successfully.

Name: SpectrumX – An NSF Spectrum Innovation Center
Description:
SpectrumX—initiated by a 5-year, $25M center grant from the U.S. National Science Foundation—is the world’s largest academic hub where all radio spectrum stakeholders can innovate, collaborate, and contribute to maximizing the societal benefits provided by this precious resource.

SpectrumX is conducting strategic research, education, and workforce development projects to transform spectrum management through flexible licenses, new coexistence approaches, and cloud automation and to unleash the full potential of 5G and beyond while expanding diverse commercial, scientific, and government uses of spectrum.

SpectrumX maintains core values of serving as a trusted resource and balancing interdisciplinary, intercultural, and individual perspectives as its foundation for developing new technologies, economic analyses, and policy options for spectrum use.

Name: QuantalRF
Description: At QuantalRF, we are transforming the RF front-end (RFFE) with ultra-compact solutions in CMOS SOI technology rivaling acoustic wave and GaAs performance for commercial broadband applications. We leverage our patented Quantal Technology to significantly improve area, cost, power consumption and overall performance.

Name: PowerbyProxi
Description: PowerbyProxi was founded in 2007 as a spin-out of the University of Auckland’s world leading wireless power department. The company designs and develops a range of safe, high efficiency and high density wireless power products. The company’s name is a play on the words “Power by Proximity” reflecting its vision that surfaces, not sockets will deliver power to all of our digital devices. The company is headquartered in Freemans Bay, Auckland, New Zealand.

Name: Interlligent UK Ltd
Description: Interlligent UK is an RF specialist offering a more personal approach to sourcing test equipment. It combines in-depth knowledge, experience and extensive infrastructure with the best training and support available in the UK, delivering a service second to none.

Name: Kingwo IoT
Description:
About Kingwo

Shenzhen Kingwo IoT Co.,Ltd(Hereby referred to “Kingwo”) is a high tech company focus on IoT technology, our business includes development and research, manufacturing , sale and operations of Beidou/GPS location service products. Our products covers to vehicle location service, asset location service, person location service and platform big data operation etc, our purpose is to provide software and hardware solutions for the Beidou/GPS all over the world.
Kingwo has very experienced R&D software and hardware team with a number of R&D design patents, the Beidou/GPS products that are provided by our company has been widely used in logistics, taxi, public transportation, banking, postal service, military police.

In recent years, with the rapid development of the auto finance in domestic market, Kingwo has become a mainstream supplier of automotive financial risky control which based on Bediou/GPS technology, as  “internet +expert of auto financial risky control products”,Kingwo has won good reputation and the market share has increased by 100% every year for three consecutive years. Among them, the self-developed 3-year long standby location terminal took up 1/3 of the national market share in 2015.

Adhering to the "customer-oriented" service concept, Kingwo will continue to focus on the location service sector, and continue to innovate around the needs of customers such as Internet+, auto finance, vehicle location services, asset location services, and person location services to provide the competitive products and service for the operators in the world and create maximum value for customers.

Name: Ondas Networks Inc.
Description: Ondas Networks Inc. is a wireless networking company that designs and manufactures its multi-patented, Software Defined Radio (SDR) platform for Mission Critical IoT (MC-IoT) applications.  Ondas’ customer end markets include Rail, autonomous transportation, utilities, oil & gas, and government.  Customers use our SDR technology to deploy their own private licensed broadband wireless networks.  We also offer mission-critical entities the option of a managed network service.  Ondas’ SDR technology supports IEEE 802.16s, the new worldwide standard for private licensed wide area industrial networks. For more information, visit www.ondas.com.

Name: Phone Recycle Solution
Description:
Reprendre   Reconditionner   Revendre 

Voici nos 3 principales activités chez Phone Recycle Solution ! Depuis 2017, nous rachetons auprès d'opérateurs internationaux des produits high-tech d’occasion . Nous les testons, les réparons, les reconditionnons selon des normes de qualité très strictes. Puis nous les revendons à nos partenaires fidèles et engagés, professionnels de la téléphonie mobile en Europe. 

Portée par le développement rapide du marché de la seconde main et par sa puissance commerciale et opérationnelle, PRS affiche une croissance à deux chiffres. Nous sommes fiers de compter aujourd’hui des dizaines de collaborateurs qui ont tous à cœur d’allonger la durée de vie des smartphones et ainsi avoir un impact positif pour la planète . 

Basée à Paris, PRS est une société 100% française , doublement certifiée par l'Afnor Service France Garanti pour notre activité et notre SAV. 
Et nous recrutons ! Alors si vous voulez rejoindre une ETI à forte croissance, leader sur son marché, qui donne du sens aux missions de ses employés, vous êtes les bienvenus  RDV sur notre page Welcome To The Jungle : welcometothejungle.com/fr/companies/phone-recycle-solution

Ensemble participons au développement de l’économie circulaire  !

Name: EnOcean Alliance
Description: The EnOcean Alliance is an international association of leading companies in the building industry founded in 2008. The open, non-profit organization enables and promotes interoperable solutions and services for intelligent and cognitive buildings, smart homes and IoT solutions based on the self-powered wireless standard (ISO/IEC 14543-3-10/11).

Name: CONVERGENT WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: CONVERGENT WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS PRIVATE LIMITED is a company based out of B-3, 118, POSTAL COLONY, 6TH MAIN SANJAY NAGAR, BANGALORE, Karnataka, India.

Name: 2CL
Description:
2CL Communications is a premier provider of leading communication and security technology solutions.

We specialise in the design, supply, installation, and support of systems for a wide range of venues and events, including conference and exhibition centres, stadiums, and events of all sizes across the UK and internationally.

Our comprehensive product range includes two-way radios, body-worn cameras, CCTV, public address and voice announcement systems, and weapon detection technologies.

We partner with industry-leading suppliers such as Hytera, Icom, Caltta, and Motorola. As a Motorola Solutions Platinum Reseller, we are recognized for our high level of technical expertise and in-depth knowledge of Motorola solutions.

2CL is committed to ethical sourcing and sustainability. Our suppliers are rigorously selected through an approved schedule detailed in our ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System, and we prioritise local suppliers whenever practical to support the local economy. Additionally, 2CL is accredited with ISO 9001 and ISO 14001, underscoring our commitment to quality and environmental management.

With over 50 years of experience, 2CL Communications stands as a trusted advisor for communication and security needs, delivering fully integrated solutions that adhere to global best practices and align with various budgets.

Name: Shimmer
Description:
Shimmer is a leader in wearable wireless sensing. The company designs, develops and manufactures a full range of wearable wireless sensors including Kinematic, Bio‐Physical, and Ambient modules.

Shimmer's main product is Shimmer, a wireless sensor platform that allows for the capture and communication of a wide array of sensed data in real‐time. It features low-power standards based wireless communication technologies and a large storage capacity which facilitates wearable wireless sensing in both connected and disconnected modes. 

Shimmer has leading expertise in application development, technical support, and systems integration. Shimmer is currently used in over 50 countries for a wide variety of applications, and the platform can be integrated into existing product, service, research, and development programs.

Name: Qubercomm Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Qubercomm’s DNA is in the wireless world-even as we focus on delivering flawless Wireless Fidelity (WiFi) solutions to our clients, our team’s agenda is to deliver flawless fidelity in services.
We bring laser focus to understanding our customers’ needs clearly. We are a strategic partner to our customers, planning with both the near- and long-term view of their businesses, and delivering to those needs precisely. This seamless and always-aligned partnership delivers confidence to our clients so that they can concentrate on their current and future business goals, even as they rely on us to innovate and deliver the right solutions in the right context for their success.

Name: Gobé - TDF Group
Description: Expert en diffusion audiovisuelle et concepteur de réseaux télécoms, le Groupe TDF se positionne au cœur de la convergence des nouvelles technologies numériques et mobiles. Fort de ses dix mille sites en Europe, TDF déploie, exploite et maintient les réseaux de communication de ses clients via l’hertzien terrestre, l’internet ou encore le satellite, et héberge les équipements télécoms de ses clients. Le Groupe développe également une importante activité multimédia : transport de programmes TV et radio sur internet, information trafic en temps réel, cinéma numérique, gestion et distribution de contenus, etc.

Name: VHA Corp
Description:
As an authorized master agent to Sprint Prepaid Group, our award-winning service to the prepaid wireless industry is powered by one thing: our people. Whether it’s sales development, operations, retail or marketing support, VHA is a diverse group of servant leaders with strong core values and performance-driven attitude who are committed to growth and success. Our culture and success are built upon 4 core values: Collaboration, Humility, Innovation and Honesty.

VHA is headquartered in Diamond Bar California with 100+ employees, 6 regional will-call centers and a network of over 2,100 dealers. VHA is named one of the 2015 Best Places to Work in Greater Los Angeles by LA Business Journal. Check us out at http://vhacorp.com/

VHA has grown from a start-up product distributor to a formidable national corporation in a very short period of time. The company was founded in 2001 by Vincent Huang in California as the 1st Prepaid Only Master Agent. Two years later, VHA became the largest Master Agent for Boost Mobile and continued its cross-country expansion to the Midwest, South and Northeast America. 

At VHA, we are known for putting customers and employees first. As pioneers in prepaid distribution, our business model focuses on supplying independent retailers the best products and programs delivered on a simple and reliable basis. We are focused on increasing long term sustainable value for our customers, investors, employees and communities. Last year alone, hundreds of highly motivated small business entrepreneurs in America trusted VHA to open Select Retail Wireless Locations for them. We are proud of our innovation and unmatched ability to serve our dealer partners.

Our culture is driven by our dedicated and passionate employees, who love what they do and love the growth and learning that comes with it. VHA believes in supporting a healthy work-life balance. We firmly believe in our people and we welcome people from all walks of life and backgrounds.

Name: cellhelmet
Description:
What began as a quest for the most indestructible iPhone case quickly evolved into something simple, yet highly creative. After landing a spot on ABC's Shark Tank, cellhelmet introduced a multitude of successful mobile accessory lines which continues to drive an exciting culture of growth and innovation.

cellhelmet prides itself on its ability to act quickly and fill voids in the wireless industry.  As our sister company owned and operated 18 Verizon doors in the Pittsburgh area, we constantly have our finger on the pulse of the day-to-day struggles of the mobile world.

Name: GainSpan
Description:
Wireless IoT Made Easy

At GainSpan, we’re powering the next wave of the Internet of Things (IoT) with wireless connectivity solutions that turn everyday products into intelligent communicating devices. You’ll find our solutions all around you…in weight/BMI scales, heart rate monitors, thermostats, door locks, air conditioners, refrigerators, ceiling fans, lighting, wireless speakers, security cameras, and more. In fact, we have more than 1,000 customer projects, with millions of units in use across the globe. 

Our end-to-end solutions make connected devices easier to develop, faster to get to market and simpler to set-up and install. At the heart are GainSpan’s certified modules, based on our GS2000, an ultra low-power single chip SoC, which supports both Wi-Fi (802.11b/g/n) and 802.15.4.

The GS2000 includes a feature-rich networking stack. We also supply application development kits (ADK) or reference designs to speed up customer product development. The ADK consists of hardware, embedded firmware and mobile apps.
 
A spin-off of Intel, we’re backed by top VC firms and strategic investors, and are partnered with leading MCU manufacturers, other semiconductor companies, ODMs and design houses –all who share our vision. A vast network of distribution partners delivers our solutions around the world.

Help shape the next 50 billion IoT devices with us!
We offer the opportunity to work with a team of exceptionally smart people, in a fast-paced, innovative environment.  We are engineers, scientists, and business managers from around the world but focusing on a single goal – to help shape the Internet of Things. We’re currently adding staff in Bangalore, India; Taipei, Taiwan; and San Jose, California; visit us at www.gainspan.com Careers section if you’d like to be part of a winning IoT team.

Name: MCS Benelux
Description:
Complexe techniek simpel maken. Dat is onze missie. Zo kan iedereen zorgeloos gebruik maken van innovatieve IoT-oplossingen. En maken we het dagelijks werk en leven van mensen makkelijker, veiliger en duurzamer. 

Dat doen wij door samen te werken met zorgvuldig gekozen partners. Wij ondersteunen hen in het opzetten en leveren van succesvolle Managed IoT-oplossingen en Private netwerken. Op die manier wordt onze jarenlange vakkennis verbonden met de kennis van partners in veel verschillende sectoren. In Nederland, België en Europa. Wij voelen ons betrokken bij onze partners en klanten, en denken actief mee in het oplossen van hun uitdagingen. Voorop lopen in het ontwikkelen van de nieuwste technologieën, zoals 5G, vinden wij belangrijk. 

Sinds de oprichting van MCS in 1997, zijn wij gespecialiseerd in Managed IoT devices en veilige en betrouwbare communicatie-oplossingen met een grote flexibiliteit. Wij leveren verschillende op maat gemaakte privé netwerken, zoals Private GSM (2G), Private LTE (4G), Private 5G en Private LoRa. Voor een vast bedrag per maand (OPEX) of als éénmalige investering (CAPEX). Ook bieden wij de benodigde hardware en software componenten voor deze netwerken. Denk aan sensoren, gateways, routers, remote device management platformen en data-analyse software. Inmiddels hebben wij al meer dan 1 miljoen IoT devices in het veld staan, en daar zijn we trots op!

Onze klanten worden volledig ontzorgd. Wij managen de optimale beschikbaarheid van hun Private netwerken en zorgen dat ze voldoen aan de nieuwste veilige updates. Ook kunnen klanten rekenen op uitgebreide technische support. Met 24*7 Service Level Agreements en ServicePacks helpen wij ze tijdens het hele project, óók na oplevering. 

Onze kennis delen wij graag. Zo organiseren wij exclusieve kennissessies, webinars en trainingen waarin actuele onderwerpen en uitdagingen centraal staan. Ook kun je ons regelmatig vinden op (inter)nationale beurzen en evenementen. 

Hoe kunnen we jou helpen?

Name: Induo AB
Description:
Vår vision -att överbrygga avstånd
Vår drivkraft är att hjälpa företag hitta rätt kommunikationslösningar, lösningar som måste fungera år ut och år in. Kommunikationslösningar som måste fungera smärtfritt. Den drivkraften är utgångspunkten för allt du hittar i vårt sortiment. Vi kompromissar inte med våra värderingar —kommunikation är vår passion.

Bringing Internet to Things
Vi erbjuder kort och gott hårdvara för uppkoppling. Hållbara lösningar för varje unik situation baserat på varje organisations individuella behov.
Oavsett om du jobbar med affärskritisk information eller bara behöver information ibland måste du kunna nå dit du vill när du behöver. Det kan handla om att starta och stoppa en pump via SMS ibland eller en frånskiljare i ett elnät mitt i ödemarken som måste slås ifrån blixtsnabbt. Med vårt breda utbud, vår långa erfarenhet och med lösningar för varje organisations behov ser vi till att du får rätt information till rätt plats och pris i rätt ögonblick.

Våra lösningar skall alltid vara det naturliga valet när säker överföring och hög överföringskvalitet står i fokus.


Minskade avstånd för människa och maskin
Induos lösningar överbryggar avstånd och sammankopplar maskiner med andra maskiner och maskiner med människor. Genom att överbrygga avstånd får vi ett hållbarare samhälle med färre resor och mindre klimatavtryck. Vi arbetar kontinuerligt med att påverka våra leverantörers klimatpåverkan genom att arbeta för högre kvalitet och längre livslängd, minskad användning av kemikalier och miljövänligare transporter. Genom att optimera alla steg i distributionskedjan kan vi jobba för färre transporter och effektivare utnyttjande av jordens resurser. Vi vill aktivt verka för att stärka regioner och orter över hela landet samt öka deras konkurrenskraft.

Description:

The XA-Appliance family scales from low cost devices to high-performance multi-core platforms operating at gigabit speeds and over 300,000 simultaneous TCP connections. 

XipLink Optimization Software (XipOS) delivers the maximum capacity over wireless links through the use of advanced TCP acceleration algorithms based on the Space Communications Protocol Specification (SCPS) to completely fill fixed or dynamic wireless links in combination with data compression and caching techniques  to exceed the link capacity and Internet optimizations delivering the best user experience.

Whether you’re exploring the wilderness, coordinating outdoor activities, or simply staying connected off the grid, Meshtastic empowers users to communicate effectively even when traditional networks are out of reach. Join our global community of innovators and enthusiasts who are pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in open-source communication.

Name: pureLiFi Ltd
Description:
pureLiFi is the global leader in LiFi technology. We are bringing to market the world’s first commercial light antennas—the optoelectronic components which make LiFi possible—for all kinds of devices, from industrial to consumer, and from smart cars to smartphones.

pureLiFi also offers LiFi systems for customers who need to augment, enhance, or transform their wireless networks with the latest in wireless communications technology.

pureLiFi was founded by the “Father of LiFi” Prof Harald Haas and Dr Mostafa Afgani in 2012. Based in Edinburgh, we have customers and partners worldwide.

LiFi, meaning Light Fidelity, is a term coined by pureLiFi co-founder and CSO, Professor Harald Haas, when he demonstrated LiFi for the first time at a TED talk in 2011. LiFi is high-speed, bidirectional, networked and mobile wireless communication using the light spectrum, to provide a user experience similar to traditional wireless systems. However, LiFi offers thousands of more highways for data to travel, which means it has the capacity to offer unprecedented data and bandwidth. The answer to our digital future.

Name: EnOcean
Description:
EnOcean | Pioneering Sustainable IoT Solutions through Energy Harvesting and Sensor-to-Cloud Connectivity

 Headquarters: Munich
 Energy harvesting technology: Leading developer of patented wireless energy harvesting technology
 Sustainability focus: Enabling CO2-footprint optimization in smart buildings and industrial applications

For over 20 years, EnOcean has been at the forefront of revolutionizing the Internet of Things (IoT) with its energy harvesting and sensor-to-cloud solutions. Our resource-saving technology and connectivity solutions provide valuable data for sustainable IoT applications, empowering organizations to make smarter, greener choices.

 Technological excellence: Miniaturized energy converters, ultra-low power electronics, and robust radio technology 
 Open connectivity: Multi-protocol solutions based on open standards (EnOcean, Zigbee, Bluetooth, BACnet, Modbus, LON, and IAP)

EnOcean's innovative solutions drive progress in building automation, smart homes, LED lighting control, and industrial applications. By harnessing the power of energy harvesting, our self-powered wireless sensor networks enable efficient communication and optimization of the CO2-footprint of buildings.

 Trusted partner: Collaborating with over 500 leading product manufacturers
 Global adoption: EnOcean-enabled products installed in one million buildings worldwide

Join us in shaping a sustainable future with EnOcean's groundbreaking technology. Together, we can create connected ecosystems that conserve resources, enhance productivity, and drive meaningful change in the IoT landscape.

You can find our imprint under the link https://www.enocean.com/en/imprint/
You can find our privacy policy under the link https://www.enocean.com/en/privacy-policy/

Built by an expert team of former Qualcomm engineers, XCOM RAN has an advanced software-defined architecture, and enables the creation of wide-area “Supercells” that eliminate handoffs and optimize throughput. The solution is engineered for mission-critical environments where reliability, scalability, and low-latency performance are essential, from smart logistics and industrial automation to defense, emergency response, and more.

By combining spectrum flexibility with intelligent orchestration, XCOM RAN gives organizations the ability to unlock new efficiencies and support digital transformation at the edge.

The most powerful private networks start with XCOM RAN.

Meru's innovative approach to wireless networking uses virtualization technology to create an intelligent and self-monitoring wireless network. With Meru, enterprises can become all wireless, smoothly migrating their business-critical applications from wired to wireless networks.

With Wi-Fi from Meru, organizations can:

•	 Deal with increasing capacity demands

•	 Deliver consistent, high-quality mobile services

We solve costs and power consumption challenges. We unlock Megaconstellation for satellite communication, we enable mass scale deployment of 5Gmmwave or level 5 autonomous driving.

Our core focus is to develop flat electronically steerable antennas for New Satcom and 5Gmmwave with the goal to connect everyone, everything and everywhere. 

Our software defined antennas are considered by the leaders of the industry as “the first innovation over the past 20 years”. 

Thanks to a reflective control of RF signal, we divide CAPEX by 5 and power consumption by 10. We are the only solution for energy sober 5GmmWave.

Beyond connectivity market, our control of RF will transform all mobility and connectivity segments!

Name: Electronic Engineering Co. EECo
Description:
Since 1946, Electronic Engineering has been the electronics and communication specialist people depend on. Electronic Engineering was founded in Des Moines, Iowa, in 1946 by William R. "Bill" Clark. It was a service organization for the two-way radio industry in Iowa, which mainly consisted of cab companies, utility companies and police and fire departments. Because of a lack of qualified technicians, most of Electronic Engineering's knowledgeable "tech'xperts" traveled throughout the state supporting businesses that required two-way technology.

In the early '70s we focused upon our roots--the communication industry. Soon after that, we became an Authorized Motorola Radius Dealer--a stepping stone for us to become a full-line Motorola Dealer, in the '80s. During that time period, we introduced Motorola display paging, which replaced tone pagers. This allowed our customers to receive numeric pages from individuals instead of operators. At the same time, we also offered text message paging. However, receiving text messages on pagers didn't become popular until the late '80s.

Electronic Engineering remains our company name. However, we have "branded" all our different product lines to include Beeper People (paging), Two-Way Connect (radios), EMS+One (lights and sirens), Security Solutions (IP VIdeo, alarms, DVR's and closed-circuit television) and Tech'xperts (repair, installation and licensing).

Name: Centre for Wireless Innovation (CWI) | Queen's University Belfast
Description:
The Centre for Wireless Innovation at Queen's University Belfast is a global research leader in PHYSICAL LAYER Wireless Communications (Europe #21, UK #8 in the ShanghaiRanking of World Universities 2025), focused on Secure Physical Layer, 6G Comms & Sensing, Antenna design (Satellites, Medical and Wearable devices), Wireless Power Transfer, Intelligent Metasurfaces.
CWI is the UK’s largest research, development and exploitation base in physical layer wireless. Our 75 researchers invent underpinning technologies for RF through THz systems and Signal Processing & Communications Theory. 
Their work focuses on the key subjects of Future Wireless Networks (mmWave, 5G, 6G), EM Sensing, Wireless Power Transfer, Connected & Autonomous Systems, Physical Layer Security and Space Applications (antenna design for EO satellites, Frequency Selective Surfaces) .

Description:

·        Novocomms is a company with an expanding and valuable market opportunity and a solid and innovative heritage.

·        The market is that of the  antenna a device which will be essential in the rapidly developing connected world. Within a few years virtually every product a person owns will connect  wirelessly and hence require an antenna. The market not only grows in numbers but the demands placed on the antenna will continue to increase as new higher frequencies and physical factors such as size and materials make high performance antennas more difficult to design. The antenna and its associated circuitry will inevitably become more complex and hence command a higher price and margin. Antennas are required for all types of devices ranging from smart watches through mobile phones to autonomous vehicles. Taking autonomous vehicles as an example the future vehicles will require a set of antennas which can handle frequencies for entertainment and communication from a few hundred megahertz right through to the millimetres wavelength sensors for collision detection and road condition monitoring. Currently a set of antennas and associated circuitry for a mid range vehicle costs several 10s of $US whereas the future set will cost several 100 $US. This market alone is enormous and one in which NVC has the technology to succeed.

Name: NFC Forum
Description:
With NFC Technology, all it takes is a tap.
The NFC Forum, a non-profit industry standards association, aims to bring the convenience of near-field communications technology to life. We empower organizations to deliver secure, tap-based interactions with an intuitive, reliable experience to users around the globe. Our member-led activities include the development of specifications and test cases, a certification program, and special interest groups that identify and evangelize contactless technology in an ever-growing number of industries.

To realize this mission, the goals of the NFC Forum are to:
- Develop and publicly publish a rolling three-year use case, liaison, technical, and certification release roadmap.
- Educate enterprises, service providers, and developers on how to deploy NFC technology to deliver impactful solutions and grow their businesses.
- Emphasize the feature of “user intent” through programs, messaging, marketing, and the rollout of a visual identifier to inform users where to tap for action.
- Enable NFC technology to deliver a consistently positive user experience in all NFC product form factors.
- Continue to promote the compliance program, develop specifications, test mechanisms, and tools that ensure consistent, secure, and interoperable use cases worldwide.

Name: BVSystems
Description:
Back in 1972 in Berkeley Heights, NJ, BVS founder and CTO, Gary Schober, began to assemble a team of expert RF hardware and software engineers. Since 1990, BVS has been designing, manufacturing and shipping our own branded products all from our headquarters in Metuchen, NJ. Over the years, the entire catalog has grown to some 200 unique products consisting of wireless test, security, safety and cybersecurity solutions including stimulus transmitters, cell phone detection solutions and cybersecurity training and education.
Back when the cellular industry was poised to transition their networks from analog to digital, BVS responded with the Gator stimulus transmitter. Gator became the top-selling transmitter in the world due to its ruggedness, lightweight and reliability and established BVS as a world class innovator of wireless test products. 
As smartphones became ubiquitous, the need to detect and locate them grew. This led BVS to develop PocketHound, the industry’s most sensitive covert phone detector. To date, BVS has sold thousands of PocketHounds to law enforcement, universities and correctional facilities around the world and has established themselves as a leader in wireless security.
In 2010, BVS developed a cellular detection system for mass transit in order to detect and curb smartphone use by distracted operators. To date, TransitHound has been deployed in over 10,000 locomotives by some of the railway industry’s largest companies. 
In response to massive data breaches and cyber attacks against small businesses and consumers, BVS CEO and President, Scott Schober, embarked on campaign to educate and arm customers with cybersecurity solutions. In 2016, Scott alongside is younger brother and VP of BVS, Craig, wrote Hacked Again and followed that book up with Cybersecurity is Everybody’s Business in 2019. Both books have been strongly embraced by the cybersecurity community and have even become part of academic security curriculum in universities.

Name: Helix Geospace
Description:
Helix Geospace is developing a range of small form factor, high-performance, antennas and CRPAs for use in a wide range of demanding telecommunications and resilient navigation applications including GNSS, Internet of Things (IoT), autonomous vehicles/driverless cars, drone delivery platforms, LEO satellite communications, personal body-worn devices and Machine-to-Machine (M2M) communications.

Our CRPx is the market leading CRPA for size, weight and power (SWaP),and total of 12 nulls across a full multi-band, L1, L2 (m-code), L5 and E5 and multi-constellation.  With both nulling and beamforming, the aim is to deliver the highest C/No to a GNSS receiver at a price point enabling PNT resilience over the broadest possible market. While our Dielectric-loaded Multi-filar Antennas (DMAs) for GNSS applications enable the sub 10cm dynamic accuracy that will be demanded for driverless cars, UAS, aerospace and many other safety critical applications where reliance of smart systems and autonomy will prevail. 

Our multi-frequency DMAs support GPS, Galileo, Glonass and Beidou constellations, with highly focused phase centre, and high common-mode noise rejection. They are immune to multi-path effects caused by reflections in city environments, and are also resilient to interference, jamming and electrostatic discharge. The ceramic substrate concentrates the electric field, minimising near-fuel effects.

Our products are designed for rugged applications, so are ideal for military, aerospace and automotive products.

Name: MobileMonday.net
Description:
Mobile Monday is a global community of mobile industry visionaries, developers and influentials fostering cooperation and cross-border business development through virtual and live networking events to share ideas, best practices and trends from global markets. Visit MoMo at https://mobilemonday.net

Mobile Monday has the following core objectives:
* Foster an open independent innovation platform within the mobile sector.
* Facilitate industry networking between small and large companies and individuals.
* Bridge partnership exchanges between domestic and international organizations.
* To present innovative trends, studies and forecasts from the mobile marketplace.
* Create opportunities for local members to effectively participate in global projects.
* Present interesting products, services, trends and practices in the mobile world.

Mobile Monday is organized by a group of dedicated volunteers from around the world. Originating in Helsinki, Finland, in 2000, Mobile Monday has become the worlds leading mobile community network.

History
The remarkable Mobile Monday phenomenon began almost by accident in Helsinki, Finland during the autumn of 2000. A couple of well-known Finnish visionaries, invited the who’s who of the Finnish mobile industry to a pub for an informal gathering and perhaps a warming drink. The only suitable time? Monday evening.

After meeting many new faces and discussing the latest in mobility, the group continued meeting on the first Monday of each month - and thus, Mobile Monday was born. By the end of 2004, the movement started to spread to other areas of the world and new MoMo chapters were launched in Tokyo, Silicon Valley as well as Rome and Singapore. Since then, the number of city locations increased dramatically, with 150 global chapters operating ±500 events per year as of 2014.

Name: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc.
Description:
We make Wi-Fi. Better.

Edgewater Wireless is the industry leader in innovative Spectrum Slicing technology for residential and commercial markets. We develop advanced Wi-Fi silicon solutions, Access Points, and IP licensing designed to meet service providers’ and their customers’ high-density and high-quality-of-service needs. With 26 granted patents, Edgewater’s Multi-Channel/Link technology revolutionizes Wi-Fi, delivering next-generation Wi-Fi today. 

Edgewater’s physical layer Spectrum Slicing allows a frequency band to be divided, or sliced, to enable more radios to operate in a given area. Think of Spectrum Slicing like moving from a single-lane road to a multi-lane highway — regardless of Wi-Fi technology.  The recently completed Proof of Concept (PoC) and Pilot with a major Tier 1 Service Provider showed 7 to 18 times performance gains in 75% of homes surveyed.  Interestingly, homes with the most devices saw the most significant improvements.  

For more information, visit www.edgewaterwireless.com.

Name: IEEE Radio & Wireless Week
Description:
RWW’26 will place a special emphasis on space RF technologies, reflecting both the transformative role of space-tech in today’s world and the region’s proximity to key space industry hubs.

While an exciting program is coming together, here is a look at two outstanding plenary talks:

3D Printed RF Payloads and Phased Arrays, by Esteban Menargues, Head of Space RF Products at SWISSto12
The History and Evolution of the Modern Network Analyzer and their role in SATCOM and 6G, by Joel Dunsmore, R&D Fellow at Keysight Technologies
In addition to the core technical program prepared by the chairs of the five topical sub-conferences and ARFTG, workshops, technical panel sessions, and short courses, numerous activities must be further highlighted:

The 2026 class of MTT-S Distinguished Microwave Lecturers will present their talks during a dedicated track, which is a perfect opportunity to get a comprehensive overview.
The 8th IEEE Internet of Things (IoT) Vertical and Topical Summit will focus in five dedicated sessions on the Impact of Artificial Intelligence on Wireless IoT Systems.
Professional panel sessions of Women in Microwaves (WiM) and Young Professionals (YP) will be again organized by the Women in Microwave and Young Professional teams.
The joint ARFTG & RWW exhibition will be hosted to showcase the latest products and solutions from industry.  The exhibition floor will also highlight an industry reception open to all conference attendees. 
The Student Paper Contest is to reward students for exceptional work. It provides students with the opportunity to share their work and discuss their results with experts from industry and academia. The Student Paper Finalists will pitch their papers with no slide-support to potential investors (the judges) in a very dynamic session. Both the elevator pitches and poster session will take place as in the past years.
MTT Space Night will be the unique event for socializing while talking about the latest space-tech news!

Name: Massive Beams GmbH
Description:
Massive Beams was founded with the goal to develop the leading development platform for O-RAN Radio Units. With 6G on the horizon, the importance of O-RAN is growing. It will create an open and transparent marketplace, allowing vendors around the world to deploy their 6G candidate technologies in real mobile networks.

However, the road ahead is not without its challenges. All the O-RU solutions available today are opaque, difficult to configure and time-consuming to. As we look to future 6G technologies, integrating them into O-RAN will be even more challenging when the hardware available today is already difficult to operate.

Massive Beams is filling this gap by providing the first Modular O-RAN Radio Unit Development Platform, MODRAD, specifically designed to help O-RAN vendors focus on their core competencies. MODRAD simplifies the integration of innovative future 6G technologies into O-RAN and enables a rapid transition from development platform to mass production of O-RUs - leading the way to the 6G future.

Name: GreenTrapOnline A/S
Description:
GreenTrapOnline (GTO)

GreenTrapOnline is advancing security and health world-wide and has for decades been offering intelligent and reliable systems for remote monitoring of rodents.  
With our system the site is being monitored 24/7 for rodent activity and not just when a pest control operator is on site.

Alerting today for a better tomorrow
Our system is monitoring and notifying about rodent activity and catch in real-time. An e-mail is sent immediately after detection of rodent activity allowing prompt action, speed up root cause analysis and reducing risks of 
infestations. We also offer digital reporting and analytics to improve audit readiness. 

Detailed rodent tracking
Most alternative systems only offer information about a rodent catch, but with our unique multi-sensor solution we are be able not only to record rodent catch but also detailed movements of rodents which results in much more effective pest management. Our system is independent of traps and bait stations which gives maximum flexibility to the pest control operator. It also allows the system to work optimal in many different settings both in- and out-side. 

Big business needs big security
Our system is highly scalable and you can add as many installations and make installations a big as you want. From anywhere our online web portal allows you to control and monitor as many sites as you want. We offer a truly 
multi-user system with very high data security.

Benefits of the GTO System:
•	Immediate alarm in case of rodent activity
•	Permanent rodent monitoring – not only catch
•	Plug and play – easy to install and operate
•	Unique multi-sensor capabilities
•	Avoid frequent inspections of empty bait stations
•	Speed up root cause analysis
•	Less business distruption
•	Improved audit readiness

Name: 福建福诺移动通信技术有限公司
Description:
福建福诺移动通信技术有限公司成立于1998年，业务范围涵盖通信系统的信息服务、软件开发、系统集成、网规网优、工程建设、咨询培训等，是中国移动通信集团福建有限公司和诺基亚通信投资（中国）有限公司的合资公司,总部设在福州，在厦门和泉州设有分公司。

      福诺拥有一支以工程师为主体的高素质员工队伍，其中本科及以上学历人员占比近90%，拥有三年以上大型项目经验242人，拥有通信类中高级以上证书258人次，拥有ICT类中高级以上证书103人次。

      经过多年发展，福诺的客户遍及全国和港台及部分海外地区，其中以福建、海南、云南、浙江、江西、湖南为主要市场。2009年，福诺把握福建移动开展ICT项目的契机，以ICT信息技术为核心带动企业战略转型。凭借丰富的技术经验和强大的人才优势，福诺不断探索新的信息交互方式与沟通可能，专注于为不同行业的客户量身打造卓越的综合信息化解决方案，帮助客户从容掌控信息未来。如今，福诺已从传统的技术服务商向信息服务商转型，并已成为可同时提供信息化技术设备和信息化整体解决方案的厂商。

      在不断拓展业务领域的同时，福诺坚持完善内部管理机制。福诺建立了专业的项目管理体系、文档管理体系、质量管理体系，为客户提供快速高效的技术支持与服务，严谨周密的工程管理、完整实用的文档资料，并严格执行TL9000质量管理体系和CMMI（软件能力成熟度模型)相关流程的要求。

      福诺致力于成为优秀的企业公民，积极参与社会公益活动，并获得多项殊荣：2006年，通过ISO9001质量管理体系认证；2007年，成为世界自然基金（WWF）金质会员，并被《财富》杂志评为“2007卓越雇主—中国最适宜工作的公司” ；2008年，被评选为福州市17家重点扶持高成长性高新示范企业之一，并被福建省信息产业厅认定为“软件企业” ； 2009年，取得CMMI-3认证和计算机系统集成资质三级，并再次被《财富》杂志评为“2009卓越雇主—中国最适宜工作的公司” ；2010年、2011年、2013年，都被评选为“福建省重点骨干软件企业” ；2011年，福诺在中国软件和信息服务交易会上被授予“最具潜力奖”和“创新产品奖”；2012年，福诺四款产品均获“中国国际软件博览会创新奖”称号；2014年，福诺获得计算机信息系统集成企业二级资质证书，福诺产品获中国国际软件博览会“创新产品奖”。

      展望未来，福诺将秉承公司的宗旨，提供优质服务，取得客户满意，实现股东利益，成为“卓越的信息服务提供商”。

Name: The IoT Consulting Partners Group
Description:
Navigating IoT and IoMT Approvals in a Post-Pandemic World

As we move beyond the COVID-19 pandemic, technology remains at the forefront of progress. The Internet of Things (IoT) and the Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) are pivotal in addressing evolving challenges and driving innovation.

The demand for wireless connectivity and IoT services is on the rise, and so is the need for precise regulatory and country-specific approvals. With advancements in technology like 4G, 5G, NB-IoT, and Wi-Fi, understanding the latest standards and requirements is more crucial than ever for successful product development.

At IoT Consulting Partners, we are dedicated to guiding you from concept to market access. Our mission is to ensure that your product meets all country-specific requirements and standards (CE, FCC, IC, MIC, ANATEL, and more), facilitating a smooth path to approval.

IoT Consulting Partners – Your expert guide to achieving IoT and IoMT market approval.

Name: Meshdynamics
Description:
Meshdynamics' technology expertise includes multi-radio mesh  networking, extremely lightweight Internet of Things (IoT)  protocols for simple devices, and Software-Defined Networking  capabilities for publish/discover/subscribe in IoT and  enterprise networks. The company is focused on  high-performance wireless networking for IoT and enterprise applications with substantial patented and patent-pending Intellectual Property. 

Unique value propositions include deterministic performance over many hops, robust and resilient outdoor networking topologies, and easier integration of legacy and emerging IOT. We bring value to Industrial OEMs with requirements for bringing IoT devices into larger enterprise networks coordinated with SDN, as well as Government agencies with security, monitoring, performance and surveillance needs for IoT devices at the edge of the network. 

Meshdynamics has licensing partnerships with OEMs, enterprises, and government agencies with requirements to integrate very large numbers of sensors, actuators, appliances, and other machines at the network edge.
 
Consider Meshdynamics products or source code licenses if your outdoor industrial networks require:

1. More than a few hops. This patented two radio back haul scales to 64+ hops in mining tunnels 
2. High speed mobility e.g. convoys or swarms traveling at 50 mph providing jitter free video, VOIP. 
3. On board intelligence in routers to autonomously control machines operating remotely with spotty connectivity 

Our Customers: 

Meshdynamics is chosen by Defense and Homeland Security Agencies in US, UK and Canada to provide mission critical video surveillance and perimeter security. These include national borders.  Thousands of nodes are active in surface and underground mining sites in Africa, Australia, China, Canada and the US.  We  provide crucial communications in mining tunnels 64 hops deep. This level of scalable performance -- validated by Government Agencies -- remains unmatched.

Name: The Mobility Marketplace
Description:
The Mobility Marketplace partners with business and government entities across the U.S. to simplify mobile device lifecycle management, reduce wireless spend, and strengthen data security. Through strategic partnerships and innovative technology, we help clients recover value from their decommissioned smartphone and tablets while ensuring complete data protection and compliance.

Born from decades of experience in the wireless industry, The Mobility Marketplace was created to bridge the gap between mobility operations and customer experience. Our mission is simple: to help organizations turn mobile complexity into operational clarity — optimizing costs, protecting sensitive information, and extending the life of every device.

We understand the challenges IT departments face — limited time, shrinking resources, and increasing security demands. That’s why our process is personal, transparent, and results-driven. From buyback programs and secure data erasure to lifecycle management and redeployment, we handle every detail so our clients can focus on what matters most: running their business efficiently and securely.

Core Solutions:
 Certified Pre-Owned Devices – High-quality pre-owned smartphones and tablets that reduce costs and eliminate the need to pay full retail for replacements or no-contract devices.
 ECO-TECH Buyback Program – AI-driven, robotics-powered data wiping and device recycling that maximizes payout and guarantees data security with certified erasure reports.
 Device-as-a-Service (DaaS) – Custom mobility programs that manage inventory, track assets, and streamline large-scale deployments for improved visibility and forecasting.

At The Mobility Marketplace, we combine innovation, integrity, and security to deliver real results — helping organizations maximize ROI on their smartphone and tablets while protecting their most valuable asset: their data.

Name: Allorado
Description:
Allorado is the next-generation LoRa gateway that allows users to easily complement their existing building installations with data from LoRa sensors. Developed by Bram Roelandts and Filip Van Craenenbroeck, Allorado is the story of new talent, relentless creativity and crystal-clear vision in partnership with vast knowledge, seasoned experience, and an eye for recognizing serious potential.  
Bram started experimenting with software at the age of eight. During high school, Bram and Filip developed SimplySmart, a modern iPhone app for advanced KNX smart homes. Bram graduated cum laude from KU Leuven in 2022 with a BSc in Engineering and he is currently pursuing an MSc in Electrical Engineering. Filip, co-founder and wisdom keeper, has close to 30 years of experience in IT, with a strong technical, program management, and pre-sales background, and a focus on embedded solutions in IoT.
The idea for Allorado came to fruition as a solution to a common problem. Although LoRa is a secure, long-range wireless protocol maintained by LoRa Alliance, it doesn't standardize data sent by devices the way protocols like KNX do. The Allorado Gateway solves this by carefully decoding bits and bytes sent from the LoRa network to telegrams that other installations - KNX, BACnet, Modbus and more -  can understand. With Allorado, users can easily enrich their building or factory with a myriad of LoRa sensors, making LoRa more accessible and easier to use than ever before.

With the swift change of a SIM card, SIMPLE Mobile has changed everything. SIMPLE Mobile is the fastest growing MVNO in the history of wireless. What made this possible? Our industry can be complicated; but it turns out offering a better, simple solution, isn't.
	Our service is designed for customers whose wireless needs are unmet— those who believe that expensive contracts are a thing of the past; individuals who are done with intrusive credit checks and hidden charges. SIMPLE Mobile gives you unlimited service, backed by a network with great coverage; at a fair price. Just bring your own phone, choose the right plan for you & pre-pay a small monthly fee. SIMPLE!

	However, we're not ones to rest. We strive to make our service better every day. You want unlimited nationwide & international text? Done. You want 4G speeds and a constantly expanding coverage area? We have that. You want to keep your current smartphone and lose its stupid contract? We hear you and we’re here to make it SIMPLE.

Name: MOÏZ
Description:
MOÏZ designs and manufactures autonomous sensors. These sensors harvest the energy needed for their operation from their environment and send the measured data (temperature, gaz-flow, hygrometry, etc.) by using a low-consumption communication protocol. 
MOÏZ sensors therefore work without batteries nor wires! Easy to install, they require no maintenance and just need a heat source of ten degrees (hot pipes, mechanical parts ...) to work! 
Our sensors are powered by innovative energy recovery technology. This technology is the result of 10 years of research at the Néel Institute (CNRS Grenoble) and is protected by three patents.

Description:

Our company is present on the following markets:

Embedded Measurement (train, plane, and car)
Process Industry (quality production control, predictive maintenance, vibration analysis ...)
Remote management applied to solar panels and wind energy farms
Environment Monitoring (waste processing, water management, food processing, agriculture…)
Technical Building Management (Measurement field within energy efficiency)
 

BeanAir offers a wide range of COTS (Components off the Shelf) Wireless Sensor Network: acceleration, vibration, Tilt monitoring, force, pressure, temperature, shock, voltage and current.

Our Wireless Sensor Network (WSN) is a combination of ultra-low power wireless network & high accuracy sensor. We build very complex wireless sensors requiring a custom-tailored sensor packaging.
We provide to our customers high-end turnkey products integrating sensors, wireless network and software monitoring application with an OPC interface (OLE for Process Control).

We work with well-known international customers: EDF, GDF, SNECMA, ADP, SNCF, Saint-Gobain, Ministry of Defense, Dassault, Ineo Suez and more by established business partnerships with system integrators and business sales representatives.

Name: Alaris COJOT
Description:
Modern requirements in today’s Radio Frequency (RF) market are often challenging and diverse. There’s also an increasing need for communication and electronic warfare applications to be less obtrusive. Technology has had to evolve to offer better coverage and higher capacity over a wider bandwidth.
 
This makes wideband antennas the most crucial element in today’s RF systems - particularly in situations where multiple radio systems co-exist on one platform, where space is limited.
 
COJOT broadband antennas are the ideal choice.

Founded in 1986, COJOT has a reputation for delivering field-proven, quality equipment - on time and on budget. Our expertise and experience make us a recognised and trusted source of highly reliable and durable antenna equipment, and our products can be found in some of the world’s most demanding environments.
 
Our key products centre around tactical communication, electronic countermeasure and spectrum monitoring applications, covering omnidirectional and directional antennas for the manpack, handheld, and vehicle segments - including solutions for fixed installations such as on masts or shelters - that are ideally suited for high- and low-power applications from 10 to 400 W.
 
Our range of different types of wide and narrowband antennas includes the latest, state-of-the-art SMART antenna solutions like Steerable Beam and Mission Adaptive antennas.
 
We also offer a wide variety of accessories for the 20 – 8000 MHz frequency range, as well as customisation and EM-Simulation services.
 
Our extensive range is complemented by the comprehensive portfolio of our sister companies, Alaris Antennas, Alaris mWAVE, Alaris Linwave and Alaris Kuhne which have expertise in numerous product types such as Direction Finding (DF), Monitoring, Communication, Log Periodic Dipole Arrays (LPDA), Masts and supporting RF Electronics. 
 
When solid coverage in RF systems is crucial, you can trust us to have what you need.

Name: thinkRF
Description:
thinkRF is a leading innovator in wireless signal intelligence, providing advanced solutions that empower organizations to monitor, analyze, and optimize the increasingly complex wireless spectrum. Our state-of-the-art real-time spectrum analysis (RTSA) platforms, combined with our pioneering Spectrum eXperience Management (SXM) platform, are revolutionizing wireless network management and analytics across key industries such as defense, security, telecommunications, and regulatory bodies.

Leveraging a groundbreaking, IoT-driven, cloud-based approach, SXM offers continuous, autonomous network monitoring and spectrum intelligence, delivering unparalleled insights into wireless network dynamics and spectrum utilization. SXM continuously characterizes network activity within any area, seamlessly aggregating this data in the cloud for comprehensive analysis across the entire SXM network. This process generates invaluable insights, enabling clients to optimize billions of dollars in annual spending on spectrum management, acquisition, and network planning.

At thinkRF, we are committed to providing high-performance, scalable, and cost-effective tools that deliver deep, real-time signal analysis. Our technology supports critical applications such as spectrum monitoring, interference detection, and signal intelligence (SIGINT) operations, empowering users to make data-driven decisions and achieve superior wireless network performance—all at a fraction of traditional costs.

Driven by relentless innovation, thinkRF is dedicated to shaping the future of wireless communications, enabling our customers to gain a strategic advantage in a world where wireless intelligence is the key to success.
