Description: Cohere is the innovator of Universal Spectrum Multiplier software for Open Radio Access Networks and existing 4G and 5G mobile networks, and the developer of the Orthogonal Time Frequency Space (OTFS) 6G wireless system.

Name: Prime Light | Group
Description:
Prime Light Group is a specialist distributor of high-quality electrical components to the lighting industry and other related markets. We have been supplying top-quality products to our customers for over 30 years, and during that time we have developed an enviable reputation for excellence. Our commitment to quality and customer service has seen us become one of the most trusted names in the business.

Our partners include some of the world's leading producers of electronic and electrical components, notably BJB, TCI, Citizen, Ensto, ELT, Elkamet, Wiska and Xicato.

Our extensive product range includes LEDs, LED Drivers, lamp holders, control gear, plug & socket connectors, transformers, terminal blocks, cables, lighting capacitors, and related accessories.

More recently we have partnered with world-leading controls and emergency manufacturers who provide smart building solutions. This includes automated building management and the automatic testing of emergency lighting.

We offer the following: 

•	Standalone PIR – Movement detectors manufactured by IR-TEC.
•	Standalone Microwave – movement detectors manufactured by Merrytek.
•	Addressable controls system – Smart Building solution called Mymesh, manufactured by Chess UK.

We have acquired a reputation for excellence of service, which, coupled with a competitive pricing policy, has ensured that we now supply virtually every lighting manufacturer in the UK and many distributors, electrical wholesalers, commercial catering equipment, domestic appliance scientific and medical instrument manufacturers.

Name: TFS Grupo Amper
Description:
En TFS Grupo Amper somos fabricantes de productos exclusivos para el control total de los elementos e instalaciones a presión y contamos con 3 patentes a nivel mundial.
Nuestra solución cuenta con diferentes tecnologías como NB-IoT, LoRa,vía radio o NFC para la comunicación y configuración de los equipos, constituyendo el primer sistema global con capacidad para controlar y hacer mantenimientos reales directamente a través de nuestra aplicación móvil y la interacción del NFC. 
Hemos desarrollado una solución innovadora y eficiente mediante sensores digitales y analógicos, creando productos capaces de medir con una alta precisión en milibar y que, gracias a su acelerómetro regulable, podemos activar o desactivar la detección del menor movimiento por vibración del dispositivo mediante una simple configuración de parámetros de la aplicación móvil.
En los desarrollos de nuestro exclusivo sistema hemos diseñado cada pieza y conexión para nuestros productos y, tras muchas horas de ingeniería gracias a la inversión en I+D+I en el firmware, hemos logrado la optimización de cada una de las funcionalidades así como de la batería.

Name: Reach
Description: Reach is the leader in high-performance wireless power-at-a-distance. Reach’s wireless power solution does for power delivery what Wi-Fi does for data connectivity. The Reach system is built on state-of-the-art, patented technology, including high-efficiency power beaming circuits, network optimization algorithms, and adaptive electromagnetic surfaces, delivering a highly scalable, safe, and easy-to-use power platform. Ideally suited for critical infrastructure, government, energy, logistics, and first responders, the Reach solution provides flexible access to power where and when needed, streamlining device deployment and improving device performance.

Name: CSignum
Description: CSignum is a leader in wireless underwater communications, pioneering cable-free data solutions using patented low-frequency electromagnetic (EM) fields. This innovative technology ensures autonomous, reliable data transmission through and across the water-air boundary, water column, seabed, and underwater structures to networks on land and in the air. CSignum’s EM technology supports Critical Infrastructure Security & Defense, Environmental Monitoring, Aquaculture Monitoring & Actuator Control, and Subsea Structure industries. By enabling these sectors to digitally transform and scale remote communication systems, CSignum enhances sustainability, performance, and preparedness for unforeseen events, driving the future of underwater data communication.

Adhering to the business philosophy of “integrity, responsibility, innovation and sharing", MeiG Smart will continue to rely on forward-looking wireless communication technology and high-quality smart IoT products to create value for global customers. Facing a future world of intelligent connectivity, MeiG will focus on such core technologies as 5G, IoT, and AI to make continuous progress as a leading enterprise in the IoT industry.

Name: 2J Antennas
Description:
2J Antennas is a worldwide supplier of antenna solutions casting our net over Automotive, Marine, Telematic, Automation, and M2M markets.

With our three RF development sites in the USA, UK, and Slovakia, we have developed a reputation for engineering excellence and self-sufficiency, allowing us to provide rapid custom antenna solutions, supplementing our extensive range of off-the-shelf antenna.

We utilise a plethora of modern engineering tools, from network analyzers and anechoic chambers to simulation software and 3D printers. These tools help reduce design phases and enable us to react to our customers’ needs promptly and efficiently.

Our ISO/TS16949:2009 certified production site in Central Europe ensures production of the highest quality products. Our antennas are all manufactured under the RoHS directive and are REACH compliant. Plastic injection, SMD pick and place, product assembly and quality control are all carried out in-house, aiding us to be flexible in manufacturing and provide competitively priced products.

Our close-knit team of engineers and commercial personnel have established strong bonds with customers and suppliers, ensuring a good communication of needs, requirements, and solutions.

Ensuring the continued development of products to meet the rapidly evolving wireless world remains our primary focus, be it for 5G, 4G (LTE), Iridium communications or Galileo satellite-based applications. We work closely with technological innovators to ensure that we have a clear vision for future projects, maintaining our strong position in commercial antenna design.

After 2J Antennas has been acquired by discoverIE Group PLC September 2023, 2J Antennas and Antenova have forged an unparalleled partnership committed to innovation and excellence. Our collaboration stands poised to revolutionize antenna technology, providing premium wireless solutions to address the most pressing challenges in RF design.

Name: Vanu, Inc.
Description:
Vanu is focused on technical innovation to enable cellular coverage in areas that cannot be covered profitably with existing technology. Vanu’s software Radio Access Network (RAN) solutions enable the rapid development of new form factors targeting specific market needs. These solutions focus on reducing the total cost of ownership of cellular networks for hard to cover areas. For example, the rural solution focuses on low power consumption and small size to reduce both ongoing OPEX as well as site related CAPEX costs. The in-building solution uses Vanu’s patented secure Internet backhaul technology to reduce both backhaul costs and in-building installation costs. Vanu’s technology allows the same software base for each of these platforms, insuring compatibility across platforms and core network interfaces.

In addition to our solutions for rural coverage, in-building coverage, cellular suppression, disaster recovery, and coverage as a service, Vanu also provides custom solutions for challenging coverage problems.

WISE Certification is a collaborative effort across carriers, manufacturers, insurance providers, retailers, and more. We are focused on building consumer confidence while supporting the phone repair eco-system. 

The industry wanted to provide consumers with a trusted resource. Repair facilities now have a way to differentiate themselves with consumers and businesses looking for reliable and trusted professional that is repaired with industry recognized standards. WISE Certification means your technicians are trained in WISE certified in important areas, to mention a few:
• Handling data with care
• Battery management
• Diagnostic processes 
• Screen replacement

Name: R3 Solutions
Description:

Our patented solution EchoRing is a deterministic and decentralized wireless network that delivers cable-like reliability and performance. The result of extensive research and development, EchoRing is plug and play (PnP), 100% software-based, and compatible with standard industrial interfaces and commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) hardware. Accessibility for every client, budget, and set of requirements is key! 

Representing a keystone technology for IoT and Industry 4.0, EchoRing enables fast and easy deployment and system changeovers while greatly reducing the errors and maintenance downtimes that currently result from wear and tear on fragile components. Our solution opens the door for highly optimized production layouts as well as innovative new business models and product concepts.

Commercial real estate is a primary driver of the future of communications and technology, which will be rolled out on roof tops – CRE is poised to benefit from new demands for space, enhanced tenant service, increased tenant retention and an emerging revenue model that could exceed the income potential of today’s traditional rent rolls. Rooftops, building attachments and small cell poles are the new backbone of the 5G Revolution -- To meet the promise of an increasingly connected world, 5G providers and new wireless carriers are rushing to deploy next generation cellular networks -- and the rooftops of commercial real estate are the new backbone to satisfy the demand driven by the communications and tech sector leaders.

5G LLC offers a next generation business process that simplifies and accelerates rooftop leasing for both wireless carriers and landlords.

Connectivity doesn’t have to come at a cost to the planet.

Name: SENSING LABS long range IOT solutions and sensors
Description:
Sensing Labs provides wireless sensors solutions serving B2B markets that are driven by energy & cost savings needs and is thus primarily targeting the following markets:
• Smart Building
• Smart Metering for water & Gas
• Precision Agriculture
• Smart Industry

The Senlab Sensors combines Hardware, Firmware & Software and are easy and fast to integrate into a final end-to-end solution.
Our value proposition has 3 focal points:
• Reduce cost of data
• Provide content-rich data previously unavailable
• Simplify data acquisition

LoRaWAN communicating SENLAB sensors offer an optimal solution for data recovery under various environmental conditions (internal, external or difficult). SENLAB sensors are compatible with all public or private LoRaWAN networks. 
Sensing Labs tools and services make it easy to use and configure sensors.
IOT devices designed by Sensing Labs: 
- Senlab M (gas and water),
- Senlab Led (electricity), Senlab T (temperature),
- Senlab A (4-20 Ma),
- Senlab PIR (Passage or Presence Detector),
- Senlab T & H (temperature and humidity),
- Senlab D (All or None),
- Gateways (Senlab Pico Gateway or Multitech)
All sensors have a range of 15 km free field and a lifespan of up to 20 years with a communication every 10 minutes including the last 24 data acquired.

Name: Harris Communications
Description:
We are your distributed antenna system (DAS) solution.

You can get a DAS from a few different places these days, so why should you work with Harris Communications?

Our company was founded on the principles of transparency, openness, and telling our clients the truth. We are down-to-earth people, who value your time, as well as our own. We help businesses improve their cell phone receptions with in-building DAS systems. Harris Communications increases your company’s productivity while adhering to established industry standards. Contact us today to begin a quote and learn more about how a DAS can improve your occupants' safety and quality of life.

Name: Sensefields
Description:
Serving the latest needs of the intelligent mobility landscape worldwide, Sensefields cutting edge technology is revolutionising the traffic management field, contributing to a greener, safer and citizen-friendlier future.

Based on the IoT, and using cutting edge wireless communications systems that detect, collect and process urban and interurban trafﬁc condition data, Senseﬁelds offers an End-to-End solution within a great variety of smart cities, smart roads, smart parking and smart air-port data applications. 

Core to the Sensefields solution is the technological triad of Magnetic Wireless Sensors connected with fog-based Data Processing Stations that send real-time information to cloud-based Traffic Management Software or local based systems, which allow for cost-effective and versatile solutions, ensuring the successful management of both city roads and highways. 

The wireless magnetic Senseﬁelds sensor, quickly installed with a minor perforation in the pavement,  transfers the detected data to the Data Processing Station (DPS) that processes the received information and communicates it to the selected trafﬁc regulation local  systems or/and to "fog based" or "cloud based" trafﬁc management software.

High precision, quick installation and very low need of maintenance, describe the sophisticated Data Integration Services across all areas of Senseﬁelds infrastructure expertise:

Trafﬁc Data Collection       
Signal Activation 
Guided Parking 
Toll Service Levels Measurement 
Environmental Sensors Data Correlation
Queue Length Measurement     
Trafﬁc Light Microregulation 
Variable Speed Signal Management 
Movement Matrices Measurement

Taking advantage of the pioneering expertise and the long experience in the trafﬁc management industry, Sensefields is now revolutionising the Connected Vehicle ﬁeld by offering advanced telematics services combining established geolocalisation applications with sophisticated local data processing solutions.

Description:
At ClearSky, we believe every telecom operator—big or small—can deliver secure, profitable, and innovative services that connect people, build relationships, and strengthen communities. 

For more than two decades, we’ve helped over 100 operators worldwide optimize their networks with our advanced Traffic and Policy Management (TTM) solutions, engage audiences through A2P messaging (iCODE), and offer cutting-edge security and authentication via our Silent Network Authentication Protocol (SNAP). 

Our robust iCODE A2P ecosystem is powered by strategic partnerships that link demand-side aggregators with MNOs, MVNOs, OTT providers, and broadband operators—driving shared revenue for all.

Name: Brazil Tower Company
Description:
Brazil Tower Company (“BTC”) constructs, develops and owns wireless and broadcast communications towers in Brazil. Our primary business is the leasing of antenna space on multi-tenant communications towers to wireless service providers and radio and television broadcast companies. 

Brazil is experiencing unprecedented wireless expansion. Anatel projects 150,000 new cell sites to be deployed in Brazil by 2015, not including those needed for the coming higher frequency WiMax technology. 

All wireless carriers are expanding their networks. Fixed line operators are using microwave for backhaul. Broadcast companies are now transitioning from analog to digital transmission. With the demand for passive infrastructure at an all-time high, BTC is here to assist our customers with meeting these demands. 

BTC launched its business operations in Brazil in August 2011. With the first sites in Bahia, our company is  focused on building quickly and efficiently for the customers to meet their coverage and capacity goals. We plan to deploy several hundred towers in Northeast Brazil between 2014 and 2016. By doing so, BTC will provide needed passive infrastructure to cellular carriers, wireless landline operators and cable operators in this important but under-served region of Brazil.

All of our towers are in the 40 meter to 60 meter class and are designed to fit multiple tenants. Our contracts are designed to be the simplest in the industry. We look forward to working with your team and planning together.

Posicionada horizontalmente , Wireless Logic trabaja con cientos de aplicaciones verticales - éstos incluyen el seguimiento de activos y vehículos , la telemetria , la medición , la seguridad , el pago electrónico , el cuidado de la salud y una amplia gama de soluciones empresariales.

Name: RF Venue
Description:
RF Venue manufactures innovative, novel technologies that make wireless audio systems work and sound better.

RF Venue was formed to develop spectrally efficient tools that are needed as spectrum space grows scarce and interference increases. Spectrum - the radio frequencies - are finite, and precious.

In the first years of operation, RF Venue launched a line of proprietary antennas that addressed signal strength by intervening on the physical layer, greatly improving reception without needless complexity. The Diversity Fin, CP Beam, and RF Spotlight were rapidly adopted in facilities, and on stages, around the world.

Recently, RF Venue has expanded to address other layers in the wireless signal chain. Today, the company designs, makes, and sells radio frequency and fiber-optic antenna distribution products, hardware and software spectrum analysis tools, and coaxial cables through a fast growing international network of resellers and distributors.

By applying new technology to old problems, repurposing established know-how to solve new problems, and questioning stubborn beliefs, RF Venue brings to wireless audio a perspective that is fresh, inventive, and effective.

And the best - we promise - is yet to come.

Name: KAUST UNESCO Chair on Education to Connect the Unconnected
Description:
In 2022, the International Telecommunication Union (ITU) estimated that about one-third of the global population is still without internet connectivity. Connecting the unconnected is crucial for fostering global inclusivity and addressing socio-economic disparities. Indeed, access to the internet empowers individuals with enhanced access to educational resources, economic opportunities, and healthcare services.

In this context, a UNESCO Chair (lead by Prof. Mohamed-Slim Alouini) has been established in the Communication Theory Lab (CTL) at King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST) focusing on education and research to connect the unconnected. Faculty, researchers, and graduate students are actively collaborating in this framework to enhance global internet connectivity enabling remote learning and breaking down geographical barriers to education. This UNESCO Chair is committed to fostering expertise as well as organizing research workshops and educational schools to promote knowledge in this crucial area.

The UNESCO Chair also aims to empower individuals and communities, bridging the digital divide and contributing to a more inclusive and connected global landscape. Beyond connecting unconnected individuals, the UNESCO Chair is also promoting educational and research activities that are pioneering the connectivity of sensors, actuators, and IoT devices in challenging environments. The focus goes beyond conventional boundaries, addressing connectivity in hard-to-reach areas and extreme conditions where standard constraints apply. By pushing the limits of technological solutions, this Chair strives to create robust networks that enhance data exchange, even in the most demanding scenarios.

In pursuit of this vision, our team comprises exceptional faculty members, researchers, and graduate students dedicated to devising sophisticated mathematical, algorithmic, and practical solutions for communication systems operating in these environments.

Name: NeoCortec
Description:
NeoCortec is a manufacturer of the NeoMesh wireless sensor network protocol stack, as well as ultra-low-power bi-directional wireless FCC & CE pre-certified communication modules with the stack integrated.

The NeoMesh protocol stack is a 2nd generation wireless communication protocol stack enabling nodes (sensors, actuators etc) to communicate with each other wirelessly and without setting up a separate, external wireless network. Instead will all nodes themselves establish the NeoMesh wireless network, forming a mesh network and where all nodes acts as routers for passing messages between nodes.

Key words for NeoMesh are: reliability, scalability and low power operation. 

The network modules operate either on sub-GHz frequencies or at 2.4 GHz in the license free ISM bands, and can easily be integrated with sensors or actuators into becoming nodes, or added to gateways to ensure cloud connectivity.

NeoMesh complements 5G LPWAN technologies like LTE-M and NB-IOT cloud connected sensors by extending the range of these LPWA networks into hard to reach places such as deep indoor or underground. As an example, nodes in the basement or at places without coverage can easily be reached through forming a mesh-net to a node with 5G connectivity. As an added bonus, there are no additional subscription cost for these mesh connected nodes.

Typical applications of NeoMesh include wireless sensor networks for installations used in home and building automation (HBA), industrial automation, alarm and security systems, indoor asset tracking and agricultural and forest monitoring, to mention a few.

NeoCortec is based in Copenhagen, Denmark, and is owned by the Danish Private Capital Fund HP Holding A/S.

Name: Ruckus Wireless LTD
Description:
Developing Simply Better WIFI!!

Ruckus Wireless is a pioneer in the wireless infrastructure market, enabling carriers and enterprises to stay ahead of the exploding demand for high-bandwidth applications and services. The Ruckus Smart Wi-Fi technology redefines what’s possible in wireless network performance with flexibility, reliability, and affordability. We call this Pervasive Performance. 




It all starts with our patented Smart Wi-Fi technology and its unique ability to extract unmatched capacity and reliability out of the 802.11 standards. Smart Wi-Fi leverages high-gain adaptive antenna technology and sophisticated best-path-selection algorithms to form and direct Wi-Fi signals over the highest performance paths to each and every client. Browse through our whitepapers and videos to learn about this technology in much more detail. Here, we’ll just say that it's so unique and powerful that we've been granted 60 patents – with more than 82 pending.

With this technology, we're able to do something that basic wireless technology can't - deliver longer range and more reliable Wi-Fi connections to client devices; Wi-Fi that reaches farther and is inherently more stable due to the adaptive nature and control of our technology. Smart Wi-Fi constantly steers signals around obstructions and obstacles, mitigates interference, and focuses RF energy only  where it's needed to ensure unprecedented coverage and consistent performance at longer ranges.

Ruckus Wi-Fi systems, with on our with our patented BeamFlex technology, are deployed in hundreds of thousands of locations across the globe.

By focusing on our customers worldwide, and the demands of the rapidly growing M2M, IoT and connected consumer electronics markets, we have steadily gained market share in the key areas of Home Appliance, Automotive, Wearables, Healthcare, Industrial and Retail, Smart Cities and Smart Grid.
C&T RF Antennas Inc is fast becoming the antenna provider of choice for leading module vendors and systems integrators. This is because our off-the-shelf antenna solutions provide high efficiency, low power consumption and reliable performance that are required for wireless M2M, IoT, and embedded electronic applications.
 
Mainly design and manufacture of WLAN, WiMax, GSM, CDMA, WCDMA, TD-SCDMA, CDMA2000, GPRS, DVB, DVB-T and other high-frequency antenna and connection lines, products for wireless AP / ROUTER, wireless network card, network switches, laptops , Wireless public / business, mobile phones, car phones, car GPS and other wireless terminals and a full range of antenna products.
With our strong R&D capability, many years of experiences in RF antenna products, we continue to expand our global customer base and successfully established strategic relationships with major business partners in wireless and telecommunication fields, we offer customers a comprehensive range of RF antenna solutions and products.
By providing reliable systems, products, and services to our global customers, C&T RF Antennas Inc. continues to enhance the quality, as well as the efficiency and productivity in RF fields.

Name: Teasol Technologies
Description:
TEASOL Technologies is a deep-tech telecom startup specializing in next-generation mobile network sharing automation. Our flagship platform, TEASOL Exchange, enables MNOs, MVNOs, Neutral Host Providers, and Private Network Operators to dynamically share underutilized network infrastructure and capacity. 

Using advanced ML/Deep Learning forecasting, TEASOL Exchange automatically matches service demand with available network resources—addressing the industry’s biggest challenge: the lack of automation and orchestration in network sharing. The platform integrates seamlessly with any existing management and orchestration system, filling a crucial gap not covered by traditional vendors. 

Built to support the future of 5G, 6G, private networks, and neutral-host deployments, TEASOL Exchange reduces infrastructure costs, accelerates time-to-market, and unlocks new monetization opportunities for service providers. 

Founded in 2025, TEASOL is headquartered in Eindhoven (NL) with development teams in Istanbul (TR) and Sunnyvale, California (USA). 
We will officially launch TEASOL Exchange at MWC Barcelona 2026

ALifecom是一家無線通訊信令測試解決方案領導廠商，專為全球一流的工業用/消費性電子產品大廠提供蜂巢式行動網路測試方案。多年來我們持續專注在先進無線通訊技術的研發，研發團隊已累積深厚技術基礎：從WiFi、DVB-T、3G、WiMax、g.hn、4G LTE/LTE-A、eMTC、NBIoT、small cell、到最新的 5G NR技術，我們專精於蜂巢式行動網路的終端與局端(包括基地台與核網)相關無線通訊技術，並自主發展出多項無線通訊技術關鍵智財。強大的研發團隊所專精的專業知識包括硬體、射頻、韌體、基頻、通訊協議以及應用層軟體等。我們認真傾聽客戶的需求並設計完整的局端系統（包括基地台與核網）達到真實網路的最佳仿真能力，並發展出創新的分析工具，降低使用者測試的複雜度，使得ALifecom 測試設備具備”易於使用”、”剛好足夠”、”最佳性價比”以及”一對多測試”等優質特點來協助我們的客戶研發產品與測試。 ALifecom 富宇翔科技擁有豐富無線通訊研發經驗，專為客戶提供面對面諮詢，協助客戶克服 4G LTE及5G NR在產品開發及生產的難題，包括功能測試、通訊協定及 RF 測量等各項技術與專業知識方面均累積了關鍵的優勢。ALifecom 富宇翔科技運用多年來累積的技術優勢，為客戶提供最佳的 4G/5G 一對多測量解決方案，協助其縮短上市時間。

Om dát te bereiken is ketensamenwerking noodzakelijk. In de Sqippa community werken fabrikanten, dienstverleners en gebouweigenaren samen om producten en diensten beter op elkaar af te stemmen. De community maakt gebruik van het Sqippa platform. Een IoT oplossing voor het draadloos monitoren van sensoren en apparaten in een gebouw. Gebaseerd op een wereldwijde open standaard. In eerste instantie ontwikkeld voor het beheer van noodverlichting, maar met het doel uit te groeien tot een platform voor vele toepassingen die passen in een Smart Building.

De ambitie van Sqippa is helder: één gebouw, één platform. In de wereld van morgen, waar alles en iedereen met elkaar verbonden is, is er geen plaats meer voor opgetrokken muurtjes en hindernissen. Dus geen honderd-en-één verschillende systemen meer met eigen apps en registraties. Alle apparaten - van CO2 sensoren tot koffiezetapparaten - worden zichtbaar in Sqippa Online.

Name: ClodPi Labs
Description:
ClodPi Labs is a technology startup in IoT space, which builds products in low power long range sensor data network  communication, using technologies like LoRaWAN and NB-IoT.
With the evolution of Internet of Things, everyone understands the benefits it can bring to various industries like Smart Cities, Manufacturing, Construction, Transport, Health, Oil & Gas, etc. IoT can help monitoring, mass (fleet) management, predictive maintenance, etc. Thus helping the industry to be more efficient, save energy and preserve resources.
Irrespective of the industry, all of the solutions in the above list needs a reliable communication network to send and receive the sensor and actuator data. They also need to be low power consuming (when battery operated) and cheap (unlike GMS, which has recurring cost) and easy to setup and operate.
ClodPi labs works in this space, to build and enable others in building solutions which leverages LoRaWAN for efficient low power private network for the sensors.
Our products include our own LoRaWAN gateways (indoor and outdoor), Network Servers (for secure and easy integration with the downstream applications) and various wireless sensor modules like metering (energy, gas, water, etc), temperature, etc.
It is said that by 2020, 60 to 70 billion “things” will be connected by IoT. We believe that LoRaWAN is going to cover 70% of the same. And that is our market size!
We strongly believe in cutting-edge technologies when made available to the mass as simple solutions brings success. We are a strong team of specialists in hardware, firmware and software, all working towards this goal.
We have built our own simple solutions, but solving complex problems. We keep our competition away by always being ahead of the industry in-terms of tech. For example, we have been researching LoRaWAN and building prototypes for the last two years. We are doing the same for NB-IoT.

ENTREPRISES: la solution Monkey-Locky s’adresse aussi à vous pour faciliter la gestion des clés dont vous avez la garde: conciergeries, services à domiciles, aide à la personne, agences de location... Discutons de vos besoins!

Description:
Fondée en 1999, Lognet accumule les réalisations intéressantes. Aux fils des années, nous avons développés une expertise inégalée dans le Sans-fil au Québec au même titre que la technologie elle-même à grandement évoluée ! Augmentant la fiabilité et se rendant jusqu'à du Gigabit par secondes. Nous la décrivons comme la Fibre Optique sans-fils !
L'équipe de Lognet a compris qu'il y avait un marché pour les entreprises dans le besoin nécessitant un lien internet symétrique, dédié et monitoré pour assurer une qualité de service.

Chez Lognet, nous avons une solution personnalisée pour chaque client, car ceux-ci ont des exigences et des réalités différentes.

La différence avec Lognet ? Notre travail est que le client soit toujours ''Up and Running'' et nous avons compris cette réalité. Pour Lognet, l'internet n'est pas une commodité, elle est vitale. 
La question est simple, quel est l'impact sur votre entreprise si vous n'avez pas d'internet pendant une heure, une journée. 

Avec l'expertise ''sans-fil'' que Lognet a développé, nous avons pu réaliser des projets de grande envergure. Le meilleur exemple que nous pourrions donner: nous avons reliés le siège social d'une entreprise de Laval avec sa succursale de Québec et de Longueuil à l'intérieur de notre propre réseau internet. Ce qui est un avantage indéniable, car le client a maintenant son propre réseau privé ( LAN extension) entre ses sites et peut en plus bénéficier de nos deux centres d'hébergements reliés sur notre réseau Lognet.

Lognet vous fournit une '' autoroute privée '' entre vos succursales et nos centres d'hébergements. 
Vous avez besoins d'hébergement à haute disponibilité ? De sauvegarder vos donneés à l'extérieur de votre bureau ? Nous offrons c'est solutions !

Notre réseau est constamment en expension pour desservir le mieux possible notre clientèle. Nous couvrons la région du Montréal Métropolitain ainsi que la Rive-nord et la Rive-Sud en plus de couvrir la Ville de Québec.

AVEROS's systems and solutions are designed to be intuitive, cost-effective, secure, and of high quality and reliability.

AVEROS’ unique and state-of-the-art technological solutions help to provide companies and their customers with full and real-time situation awareness of their environment, their customers, their staff, and their valuable assets and thereby improving their operational efficiency and improving their market positioning. 
 
The CoreBlu line is an advanced Bluetooth Low Energy 5.x beacon device series using multi-standard beacon Technology.

Beacons/Tags

Scanners/Gateways

Software

Cloud and on-premise server-based RTLS software engines
Browser-based platforms and management dashboards
Smart mobile phone SDKs Android and iOS
Mobile App software tools and firmware for our hardware devices

AVEROS Solutions

NaviBees (SDK) -Indoor Positioning & Navigation System, Wayfinder Kiosk,  ALS - Real-time Location Sphere, VALS - Visitor Auto Location Systems.

Name: RF Integration Inc.
Description:
RF Integration is a leading product development and fabless IC company located north of Boston in Billerica MA. Incorporated in 1999, its primary products and services include;
 Full turn key product development and supply of RF and wirelesso systems and modules,
 RFIC’s or mixed signal IC’s with significant RF content,
 RF IP blocks for integration into third party SoC’s.

RF Integration develops complex wireless solutions including radio semiconductor-based  solutions starting from a total systems perspective.
 
The company has delivered numerous RF products and has a silicon proven IP library for radio applications.
RF Integration has experience in SiGe, RF CMOS, GaAs and SiP technologies with process technologies ranging from 250nm to 65nm. Over the years, it has released many products to full production and has developed silicon verified IP at many of the world’s leading foundries. In 2007 RF Integration was a recipient of the prestigious Beacon Award from IBM in recognition of its track record of successful RF development. RF Integration operates in diverse markets ranging from consumer electronics through wireless infrastructure, industrial applications and defense. Its customer list ranges from innovative startup companies to very large defense contractors. The common denominator is the continually growing need for higher levels of integration in the Radio and mixed signal portion of wireless products. This trend is driven by cost or size reduction needs as well has the expectation among many so called “second tier” applications that they too can achieve levels of integration typical of cellular phones

Controlled by smart phone and tablet apps, these solutions are built with future smart grids in mind. Sophisticated end-user products contain ubisys’ unique IEEE 802.15.4 and ZigBee stacks for 32-bit ARM cores. As a technology leader ubisys brought to market outstanding products long before "the Internet-of-Things" became a buzz-word.

Besides its strong focus on Zigbee products and solutions for the connected home and smart buildings, ubisys has engineered various solutions for the auto ID market (1D/2D barcodes and LF/HF RFID) and offers a set of high-quality, multi-standard RFID readers in the 13.56MHz HF band which are used in industry, logistics, medical, payment and further RFID/NFC application domains.

Name: 盟讯（广州）电子有限公司
Description:
盟讯集团（Unication）是一家具有30多年经验的专业无线电产品的销售跨国企业。在中国大陆、台湾、美国、加拿大设有代理公司，并在全球多地设有营销据点，产品畅销多个国家，主要用于军队、公安、消防、交通、医院、国土安全、资源探测及保护等行业。

盟讯(广州)电子有限公司成立于1999年，并斥巨资在广州市最高档写字楼珠江新城购入2层物业作为代理公司。目前公司拥有一支力量雄厚、经验丰富的高素质队伍，一直致力于无线通信产品的销售，积累了雄厚的无线电通讯的经验。公司所销售的产品运用多种核心技术，从硬件射频电路、天线、基带电路、通讯协议、DSP算法、加解密、视频压缩、RTOS、Driver到上层应用软件。

公司秉承不断追求完美的产品以赢得客户良好的口碑，从而使公司得到永续发展的经营理念，致力于无线通信产品和系统的销售，包括无线电台、对讲机终端和系统、基站、控制器、近距离自组网无线数字通讯系统、通讯网关/服务器、专用智能手机、各种POCSAG/Flex/P25 Pager等。

公司以自有品牌销售产品，销售之各类无线通信产品，规格与质量皆符合国际工业标准，通过欧、美最高安全规范认证，已获得市场客户认可并指定使用，长期销售通讯产品给世界几大通讯巨头，包括Motorola，Codan, Verizon，TI ，LG，USA Mobility，MCI（KYTEL）……

公司内部有完善的福利制度、以及内部培训体系和评估体系，包括新人入职公司培训、新员工课程培训、项目发展培训、不定期的外训等等。每年依公司年度经营状况及部门绩效按公司调薪办法调薪。每年依公司年度经营绩效及部门绩效按公司办法"分享"公司经营绩效年终分红。每年有两次晋升机会，公司对各阶主管提供主管加给费用。对主管、资深员工、或有特别贡献的员工给予分配股权，详见：

1.    員工均有机会到国外（加拿大 / 美國）的分公司培训、技术交流，提升技能。

2.    公司盈利的30%给员工分享，30%留作公司发展基金，40%为股东分红。

3.    免费自助午餐（公司有獨立餐厅）。

4.    每年有两次晋升机会，晋升主管后，每月额外获得的主管加给：组长3,000元，副课长4,000元，课长6,000元，副理7,000元，经理8,000元，专案经理9,000元。

5.    员工每年有1次调薪机会。

6.    员工每年通过评核都有年终奖金。

7.    员工根据表现累积积分，达到门槛，就会被公司邀请入股，成为股东，分享股东分红，让自己工作不是为别人找工，而是为自己打工。

8.    优秀员工及其直系家属当年如有赢利则由董事长亲自带队到国外旅行。

9.    经理级以上主管配车、手机、iPad Pro, 报销话费 。

10.  每年组织体检、旅游、年会抽大奖、运动会等各种活动。

11.  结婚、生育均有補助金；員工及家属急難，公司均發補助金。

盟讯未来将积极投入远距离宽带多媒体通讯(Broadband Hopping 2 ways Radio/5G)和近距离通讯(Mini Cell/BT/WIFI/NFC)、有线通讯(LAN/PSTN)及无线通信同时共存的多连接及相互交换领域的销售，除强化销售阵容外，还与国内外机构密切合作交流学习新一代通讯系统。

Name: Eurofins Product Service GmbH
Description:
Wir machen die Welt ein bisschen sicherer! Als akkreditiertes Prüflabor testen wir elektrische und elektronische Geräte in unseren Laboren auf Herz und Nieren nach verschiedenen geltenden Standards. Dabei prüfen wir nicht nur die Produktsicherheit und die elektromagnetische Verträglichkeit, sondern ebenso die im Gerät verwendeten Funktechnologien. Sogar mechanische Umwelteinflüsse können wir in unserem Umweltsimulationslabor simulieren/nachbilden. Entspricht das Gerät allen erforderlichen Standards, wird das von unserer Zertifizierstelle bescheinigt und kann somit je nach Bedarf in über 180 Ländern zugelassen werden. 
Wir sehen neue Geräte und Entwicklungen noch bevor sie auf den Markt kommen und helfen dabei, mit der Überprüfung der Gebrauchstauglichkeit und der Produktsicherheit, die Gefahren für die Endverbraucher zu identifizieren und somit zu minimieren. 

Wir suchen Sie - abwechslungsreiche Aufgaben und interessante Tätigkeiten erwarten Sie in einer der spannendsten Firmen Brandenburgs. Jetzt reinschauen und bewerben!

Name: Eden Rock Communications
Description:
Founded in 2007, Eden Rock Communications is a pioneer in the Self Organizing Network (SON) space and is the developer of the industry’s leading SON technologies and solutions. Eden Rock team members began working together in the mid-1990s for the AT&T “Project Angel” where the team pioneered one of the first commercial applications of OFDM for broadband wireless. 

The Eden Rock team has collectively amassed unique expertise in both the system design of 4G products within OEMs and the deployment of 4G networks within operators. Eden Rock has leveraged its team’s unique expertise with 4G technology innovation, algorithm design, product development, and network deployment in order to cross conventional boundaries in the creation of Eden Rock’s novel dynamic resource optimization technologies. Eden Rock’s initiative has spawned numerous inventions and resulted in Eden Rock’s highly-innovative SON solution. Eden Rock has established a formidable IPR position with more than 70 SON-related patents/patent applications.

Description:
The Wireless West Conference was created by five wireless associations spanning the West Coast and Rocky Mountain States: Arizona Wireless Association, California Wireless Association, Colorado Wireless Association, Nevada Wireless Association and Northwest Wireless Association. 

Its goal is to educate the wireless community and providing a forum where industry professionals can join together for two days of shared learning and networking. Wireless West attendees will have the unique opportunity to attend keynote addresses and breakout sessions hosted by top wireless executives and thought-leaders throughout the industry, as well as receive exclusive insight on what’s new in wireless, gain exposure for their companies, and network with peers and professionals throughout the industry.

Name: Metirionic GmbH
Description:
Metirionic pioneers high-precision radio-based ranging and localization software solutions, specializing in Bluetooth Channel Sounding, UWB, and IEEE 802.15.4 technologies. Our expertise in 2-way ranging (2WR), 1-way ranging (1WR), and point-to-multipoint fine-ranging has set new industry standards, enabling secure, real-time distance measurement for the Internet of Things (IoT).

Our technology ensures sub-meter accuracy in indoor, outdoor, and long-range environments, making it ideal for automotive digital keys, secure building access, and industrial automation. From enhancing 'Find My Device' applications to Real-Time Location Services (RTLS), asset tracking, proximity detection, and safety monitoring, Metirionic empowers businesses with next-generation positioning capabilities.

With over a decade of innovation, we continue to refine low-power, high-accuracy ranging solutions that seamlessly integrate into existing wireless ecosystems. Whether optimizing logistics, industrial IoT, or access control, our solutions bring unparalleled precision and reliability to a world where distance matters.

 We know the distance!

sales@danmagi.com

Name: Artemis Networks
Description:
Artemis pCell vRAN technology is an entirely new approach to wireless, delivering over 1 Gbps in 20 MHz of spectrum for Private or Public LTE or 5G networks, over 10 times the data rate of conventional cellular LTE/5G in the same amount of spectrum.
 
pCell’s first large-scale commercial deployment is a Private mobile network in SAP Center, home of the San Jose Sharks, a 140,000 sq. ft. (13,000 sq. m), 20,000-seat arena using free CBRS spectrum, where it not only delivers 1 Gbps per 20 MHz, 10x the aggregate data rate of the existing arena cellular network, it does so uniformly throughout the arena, while the cellular network data rate varies widely from seat-to-seat. 

Artemis was founded by inventor and technology pioneer Steve Perlman in the early 2000s. Incubated for over a decade by Rearden Companies, Artemis is based in Mountain View, California. 

pCell technology is protected by a broad portfolio of fundamental patents, both US and internationally.

Learn more and tell us about your Private or Public LTE/5G network requirements at www.artemis.com.

Name: NanoPing
Description:
NanoPing helps you fix the fragile parts of the internet. Our technology makes your networks more resilient, more efficient, and ready for the demands of tomorrow. Using advanced coding techniques like Forward Error Correction (FEC) and Random Linear Network Coding (RLNC), NanoPing ensures reliable data transport - even when the network gets unpredictable.

Whether you’re building mission-critical systems, streaming across shaky links, or optimizing performance in high-latency environments, NanoPing gives you the tools to move fast, stay online, and deliver consistently. You don’t have to settle for workarounds, now you can solve problems that traditional networking tools can’t touch.

Name: AsiaRF Co., Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 1996 by visionary entrepreneur Paul Lai, AsiaRF has been at the forefront of wireless communication network technology and products. Paul Lai's keen insight enabled him to dive into the emerging wireless networking industry when it was in its infancy. Recognizing the potential that lay ahead, he committed AsiaRF to pioneering advancements in this field.

In its early days, the company was instrumental in developing various landmark technologies, including 2.4 GHz ISM band products, 802.11b/g Wi-Fi modules, Bluetooth, Zigbee devices, 4G LTE routers, and LoRa (Long Range) communication technology. These groundbreaking products set the stage for AsiaRF's credibility as an industry innovator. Additionally, the company diversified its product range by offering a variety of antennas and accessories designed to enhance the overall performance of wireless systems.

Over the years, AsiaRF has evolved in response to the changing landscape of wireless technology. Its business has expanded from initially focusing on basic wireless protocols to more specialized and complex solutions. Today, the company is a leading player in the industrial IoT arena, offering cutting-edge products like the AP7916-NPD Wi-Fi 6E modules, the Wi-Fi HaLow IoT Solution Kit, and the latest Wi-Fi 7 modules.

Committed to quality and innovation, AsiaRF has earned a reputation for excellence through its pioneering products. The team's dedicated efforts came to fruition when their Wi-Fi HaLow IoT Solution Kit became the world's first Wi-Fi HaLow-certified end-product from the Wi-Fi Alliance in June 2023. With a legacy of pushing the boundaries in wireless networking, AsiaRF continues to be a key player in shaping the future of global communication.

Name: ND Wireless Institute
Description:
The University of Notre Dame has a rich history in wireless technology research dating back to the 1800s. The esteemed faculty made strides in this field by conducting the first wireless transmission in the U.S. from the University's Basilica of the Sacred Heart to Saint Mary's College, spanning almost a mile. 

Since 2010, the university has utilized the faculty's expertise and mission to address interdisciplinary issues and positively impact the world. Notre Dame's wireless research encompasses a range of areas, including broadband and wireless internet access, power-efficient millimeter wave transceiver architectures, radio spectrum sensing and sharing, and the development of new applications for these technologies.

Name: BATS Wireless
Description:
BATS  was founded in 2008 by leading professors and researchers from Purdue university who wanted to show that high-bandwidth wireless broadband was not the time-consuming, unreliable alternative to its wireline counterparts.

THE BATS SYSTEM began making waves (literally) at client sites in early 2009, providing companies with a patent-pending software and hardware platform that allows for the real-time extension and provisioning of wireless broadband networks. Two years later BATS has strengthened its best in class position with technologies that allow its clients to access industry-first massive capacity (Gbps +) wireless broadband solutions in nearly any environment or mobility scenario.

WHY BATS?
BATS stands for “Broadband Antenna Tracking Systems.” Essentially the core technological concept in which the company was founded.

eze System's commercial focus is on creating customer value by enhancing productivity and quality while supporting business growth and expansion. The innovative ezeio approach accelerates and simplifies customers’ processes without requiring expensive consultancy or complex engineering, allowing businesses to convert their domain expertise into automated applications in a scalable, practical, and cost-effective way.
 
At eze System, every action is guided by four key principles -
• Fast - Ensuring swift execution and rapid deployment of solutions to meet customer needs efficiently.
• Nimble - Maintaining an agile approach to adapt quickly and effectively when assisting customers.
• Now - Focusing on creating immediate impact and tangible results for customers in the present.
• Low Instep - Providing an accessible entry point, both financially and in terms of time, to enable customers to adopt their technology with minimal barriers.

These principles drive eze System's commitment to delivering high-quality, customer-focused solutions that are both practical and impactful.

Name: Wheels of Zeus
Description:
Wheels of Zeus (or WoZ) was a company founded in 2001 by Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak. WoZ made wireless hardware for keeping track of the physical location of enabled objects. The licensable technology consisted of three components:

    1. Smart Tag A tag containing GPS that could be attached to various objects, such as a brief case or pet. "Acceptable areas" could be preprogrammed, such that the tag would signal the Tag Detector when it was moved outside them. The tag communicated over a wireless network was named "wOzNet" and leveraged GPS techniques to transmit the tag's position over extreme distances with very little power.
    2. Tag Detector This was a handheld device that could monitor a collection of Smart Tags, and provide a distance and direction to help locate them when they were lost. It also communicated with the wOz Service when a Smart Tag was lost.
    3. WoZ Service An internet based service that could provide the locations of the various Smart Tags, as well as send an email or SMS notification when a Smart Tag moved outside of its "acceptable area".

In March 2006, Wheels of Zeus shut down operations. Key assets and patents have been acquired by ZonTrak.

Name: pi-lit
Description:
Pi-Litis a technology company innovating the way devices communicate with each other. Pi-Lit, is transforming the transportation industry with its wireless sequential warning lamp system. 

With two of the principles coming from the medical field, the team has a culture of customer service.  The phones are always answered  24×7.  Our patented technology is based upon a network approach referred to as a “mesh”.  In this network architecture, all of the nodes (lamps) are equal. While not easy to develop, the result is an easy to use and reliable system on the roadway.  Pi Variables, Inc., now has 15 patents describing the technology and mechanical design.

All of our products are assembled in Orange County, California.   Ninety percent of the components are manufactured within 3 miles of our facility, while a few bits and pieces come in from overseas.  All of the design and engineering is in-house. 

Pi-Lit products are now seen on roadways throughout Europe, New Zealand, Australia, Canada, Japan, and the Middle East.

Pi Variables, Inc., is named for the types of variables used in the mathematical equations required in designing radio-frequency technology. Pi-Lit is a play on the combination of the mathematical term (Greek letter “pi”) and value derived by the aviation industry in deploying sequential-flashing strobes to aid pilots on final approach to a runway.  Hence, “Pi-Lit” (sounds like pilot), not pie-Light or Pie-Lite, or pee-eye light or pie something else.  Then again, you can call us anything you would like.

Give us a call.  We love to hear from customers or potential customers.  We are enthusiastic about our technology, company culture, team of employees, and, of course, our products which bring enhanced safety to your company.

Name: Coova Technologies
Description: Coova Technologies is a leading provider of commercial and open-source solutions for the wireless and Wi-Fi Hotspot markets. The platform I've developed under Coova allows for companies to manage wireless networks through a comprehensive, flexible set of solutions that centralize and integrate RADIUS software, router firmware, and a web toolkit for client side interfaces. CoovaRADIUS and the open-source JRadius are Java based RADIUS solutions. CoovaChilli, found in wireless router firmware worldwide, is an open-source access controller that brings commercial captive portal features to a wide range of third-party commodity Wi-Fi access points. CoovaEWT is an extensive embedded web toolkit that provides the client-side interface to Coova components. CoovaEWT APIs are integral to all Coova products. CoovaChilli and JRadius are open-source with commercial licensing options available. Other products I've developed under Coova include the CoovaAP firmware distribution, the CoovaAX Android application, and several hosted services including CoovaOM (Open-Mesh) and CoovaNET. More about Coova commercial and open-source solutions can be found at www.coova.com and www.coova.org respectively.

Marquee believes our patented smart light solution and patent pending SMARTCELL platforms will receive wide adoption rates in the Cellular and Smart City deployments.

Today’s communications networks are fragmented with singular service offerings across multiple platforms such as smart devices, digital signs and kiosks on specialized and targeted market segments.

- 5G technologies
- Wi-Fi
- Surveillance Cameras
- Smart City Sensors

Integration of various “smart” services and 5G technologies, at the street level, present a huge challenge as designs and usable spaces were not intended to be deployed and work together. Cost and complexity of deployments is out of control.

To respond to these challenges Marquee Wireless has developed and offers three aesthetically pleasing solutions to assist in the quick deployment of Cellular Networks and Smart City applications:
SMARTCELL a multi-purpose, aesthetically pleasing platform to deploy 5G and smart city projects.
SMARTNODE a smart city IoT solution to deploy Wi-Fi, surveillance cameras, sensors and autonomous vehicle communication nodes in an ergonomic package streamlined to the shape of the street light. 
We also offer a Micro-mobile-edge solution to enable Mobile Operators and Networking Giants the likes of Google, Microsoft and Netflix to deploy information processing resources to the edge of the network. The advantage of our solution is reduced latency to enable 5G technologies to function as intended.

Long-range active tags: These tags enable multi-year battery life and long-range asset tracking within facilities.
Mesh-network active readers: They provide comprehensive coverage across multi-building campuses.
Applications:

Real-time inventory tracking and management: Monitor and manage inventory levels efficiently.
Personnel and visitor movement tracking in sensitive or hazardous environments: Ensure safety and security by tracking individual movements.
General asset usage monitoring: Gain insights into asset utilization and optimize operations.
Additionally, 1Rwave's solutions can be extended to serve as wireless sensor networks with online and offline functionalities. This enables functionalities like:

Multi-building temperature and humidity monitoring: Crucial for maintaining optimal conditions for perishable goods.
Offline logging of temperature and humidity data: Track environmental conditions during transportation or in uncovered areas.
By combining active location tracking with sensor network capabilities, 1Rwave's solutions offer comprehensive asset management and monitoring for various industrial applications.

Radio fire detection first became available in the early 1980′s. At that time there were many National Trust and English Heritage properties, as well as privately owned dwellings, that were desperately seeking an alternative to hardwired systems with all of the complications and disruption that such a system would bring.

Since 1988 we have been producing radio fire alarm systems that are available throughout the UK, some parts of Europe and Scandinavia. We were the first company to release a radio sounder and the first company to manufacture a combined sounder/detector. Our systems are fully addressable and can provide cover for every application from a small private dwelling to a large commercial premises

Name: Nautilus RF, LLC
Description:
Nautilus RF’s purpose is to provide in-building signal enhancement solutions for Public Safety and Cellular communications. 

Florida Building Code requires builders to use dense building materials like solid concrete exterior walls and Low-E windows.  These building materials prevent the tower’s radio frequencies from entering the building which creates dead-spots where users cannot communicate.

Nautilus RF specializes in the design and implementation of in-building wireless systems known as Bi-Directional Amplifiers (BDAs) and Distributed Antenna Systems (DAS).  Our solutions take the signal from the nearest radio/cell tower and enhance it throughout the building to provide coverage to its users inside.

Name: Jigsee, Inc.
Description:
Founded in Canada by former DoubleClick and Nortel employees, and funded by Sequoia Capital and the Indian Angel Network, Jigsee’s mission is to enable high quality media streaming experiences for billions of middle and low-income consumers in developing countries.

At the core of Jigsee’s products lie specialized technologies which allow video and other forms of rich media content to be delivered in a continuous and resilient manner to basic mobile devices, over low-bandwidth networks. With 4 patents pending and more than 4 years of testing over GPRS networks in countries such as India and Bangladesh, Jigsee has deep and substantive expertise in bandwidth-efficient content delivery.

Building on this core technology, Jigsee launched its first consumer application in August 2011 and has received more than 10 million downloads to date. Under the Jigsee brand, users watch an average of 21 minutes per day, using feature phones, and GPRS networks. This represents a 10 to 20 fold increase over viewing time per day on other competing mobile applications. 

Since June 2012, Jigsee has begun to offer its technology and platform to third party broadcasters and publishers. Leading media providers such as Disney, Reliance Digital and Sony (MSM) now use Jigsee CSP (Cloud Streaming Platform) to reach millions of mobile subscribers in high-growth emerging markets.

To find out how Jigsee can increase the reach of your content, contact us at info@jigsee.com

Name: Radio Control SMD AB - AUTEC Partner - Sweden
Description:
RadioControl SMD AB är sedan 2009 exklusiv distributör i Sverige för det italienska företaget AUTEC S.R.L., en världsledande tillverkare av industriella radiostyrningssystem. Med över 15 års erfarenhet på den svenska och nordiska marknaden levererar vi högkvalitativa, säkra och tillförlitliga lösningar för trådlös styrning inom industri, bygg och materialhantering.

Vi genomför förstudier, behovsanalyser samt ritar och designar skräddarsydda AUTEC-radiostyrningssystem som möter de unika krav som ställs av våra OEM-kunder i Sverige och Norden. Vår kompetens ligger i att omsätta kundernas behov till funktionella, säkra och framtidssäkra styrsystem.

All vår personal är certifierade servicetekniker för AUTEC och genomgår årliga vidareutbildningar hos tillverkaren. Detta säkerställer att vi alltid arbetar med den senaste kunskapen och kan erbjuda service, support och underhåll på högsta nivå.

Som partner till AUTEC erbjuder vi hela deras sortiment – från robusta handhållna enheter för enkla on/off-funktioner till avancerade system för semi-autonomi. Vi kombinerar internationell spetskompetens med lokal närvaro och teknisk support, vilket ger våra kunder både trygghet och långsiktigt värde.

Med RadioControl SMD AB får du inte bara produkter i världsklass, utan även teknisk rådgivning, systemdesign, service och utbildning – allt för att säkerställa optimal användning i varje projekt.

Name: GiG Americas
Description:
GIG’s purpose is to create a new peer-to-peer global cloud, that delivers local, neutral, green and secure cloud capacity.

To realise this, GIG has built technology along 3 disruptive technologies:
• Edge Cloud, a decentralised made of locally ‘distributed’ connected devices based on our own distribution of Linux (called Zero-OS) and our own Cloud Orchestration (At-Your-Service).
• Zero-Robot, enabling intelligent automation, application orchestration and self-healing, delivering on the purpose of running a full cloud with Zero People.
• Zero-Chain, our Proof-of-Stake based blockchain toolset which allows faster & more green blockchain workloads with integrated blockchain database and blockchain identity
management.

GIG is founded by Kristof De Spiegeleer, a serial technology entrepreneur with 20+ years’ experience
and 6 successful exits for his various companies to Sun, VMware, Verizon, Western Digital and others. Kristof teamed up with CEO, Willem Hendrickx, a prominent technology and telecom executive, most recently President of Alcatel-Lucent EMEA. GIG has over 100 employees and offices in Ghent, Dubai and Cairo.

Name: Voltraware Semiconductor Co. Ltd.
Description:
Voltraware is a fabless semiconductor company specializing in the research and development of ICs for wireless power transfer applications.  The management team consists of experts from semiconductor, IC design and wireless power related fields.
 
Volta, the transmitter side IC based on the BCD process of STMicroelectronics is the result of consolidating WiTricity’s wireless power technology IP blocks with ST’s essential IP blocks into an ASIC that serves as an Analog Front End with over 200 built-in registers for programming and NVMs for calibration/trimming.

Unlike Qi or PMA’s Magnetic Inductive (MI) wireless charging solutions that require precise placement of the device and effectively touching the charging surface for wireless power transfer, Voltraware’s technology is based on the principle of Magnetic Resonance (MR) that can charge multiple devices at a distance without the need for a precise alignment between the transmitter and receiver.
  
Voltraware’s Application Engineering team is led by Dr. William Hsu who was previously a key member of the Power Electronics Laboratory of the University of Auckland, New Zealand.  This laboratory’s research in Magnetic Resonance is uniquely recognized as one of the leaders in the world.  Dr. Hsu’s team is currently focusing on the emerging wireless power application in the e-mobility ecosystem addressing the needs for wireless charging of e-bikes and mini e-scooters as well as consumer electronics’ needs for simultaneous, multi-device charging at higher power levels.

Voltraware is a member of AirFuel Alliance, Wireless Power Consortium and Telecom Infra Project.

Name: CellGain Wireless
Description:
Established in 2005, CellGain brings seamless wireless coverage for critical public and commercial buildings, including public transit systems, airports, tunnels, office buildings, university campuses, malls, and more.  

CellGain is the premier provider of in-building wireless communications solutions specializing in seamless wireless coverage for public safety, cellular, WIFI, and back-of-house operation radios systems.  At CellGain, we pride ourselves on designing a customized Distributed Antenna System (DAS) solution unique to each client’s environment that meets local requirements and, when complete, obtains all required agency and carrier approvals.

Our Fiber-to-Antenna System (FTAS), provides seamless coverage for multiple agencies with efficiency and adaptability while minimizing space, time, and deployment costs.  The hallmark of the CellGain Wireless (CGW) Fiber-To-Antenna-System (FTAS) solution is eliminating RF coaxial cable and associated conduit/hardware as usually required by code to connect each antenna. Based on past installations, this design represents an 80% reduction in labor and material costs and 66% savings in the required footprint to install the DAS infrastructure.

With successful projects including LaGuardia International Airport, East Side Access Tunnel, Moynihan Train Hall, Penn Station, Newark International Airport, San Francisco Municipal Transportation Agencies (SFMTA), Montclair State University, and most recently, JFK International Airport, CellGain has a proven track record of success to successfully complete projects on budget and ahead of schedule.

CellGain is a certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE) with the State of New York, the State of New Jersey, New York City, and the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey.  We are also registered as Minority Women Business Enterprise (MWBE) for the Port Authority of New York.

Before Omnipoint was merged with Voicestream, Aerial, and PowerTel, it introduced many innovations which provided the foundation for today's mobile ecosystem. Among the company's many innovations: prepaid billing; international text messaging; mobile wireless Internet; Wi-Fi Sharing or tethering, and one number international roaming. As was common in the 1990s when mobile operators dictated device development, Omnipoint drove the design of many mobile phones that became consumer favorites, including the Bosch WorldPhone. Name: Virtual Extension
Description:
Virtual Extension develops and markets high performance Wireless Mesh network products for use in advanced lighting control, smart metering, wireless sensor networks and similar industrial, security and automotive applications requiring robust and fully bi-directional networking capabilities. A unique technology, VEmesh has been designed to obtain the best coverage, with practically unlimited number of nodes and hops, and to have the farthest range and highest RF resiliency in its class. 

In Lighting Control, the two families of products are Wireless extension to DALI and General Purpose, with the later transparent to most lighting control protocols and able to support up to 16,000 nodes on a single network and with IPv6 as an option. These Lighting Control Solutions product are mainly used for street and highway, outdoor, indoor and emergency types of smart lighting.

In Smart Metering, VEmesh networks power today the largest deployment of smart electricity meters in Israel. The water and gas networks consume extremely low power for years of operation on a single battery. - Sehr hohe Genauigkeit der Daten (FDA approved)

- Open Space Gebäude (Büro, Einkaufszentrum, Museum, Bank)

Name: MULTIVOICE
Description:
Formed in 2011, MULTIVOICE has been developing and perfecting mobile, hands-free wireless systems that enable simultaneous and secure group communications among fearless individuals in rigorous environments. The MV-AUDIBLE Wireless Mesh Network Intercom — MULTIVOICE’s first product — was announced in March of 2015; it allows teams of up to eight co-workers to talk simultaneously on a secure, hands-free wireless network at distances of up to one mile apart without using a base station. Additionally, the MV-AUDIBLE allows an unlimited number of Listeners on the same wireless network, while also allowing Listeners to become speakers as previous speakers drop into “Listen-Only” mode.

MULTIVOICE’s technologies revolve around the Industrial, Scientific and Medical (ISM) wireless communications frequencies of 902—928MHz in a mixture of patented, patent-pending and trade secret inventions, including U.S. Patents 8,681,663 and 8,705,377. By utilizing FDMA (Frequency Division Multiple Access), TDMA (Time Division Multiple Access), Frequency-Hopping Spread Spectrum and select proprietary wireless communications methodologies, MULTIVOICE enables real-time, simultaneous, secure and hands-free wireless audio communications among group members.

MULTIVOICE’s MV-NEXUS is built to fit in standard 5.11-size pockets and pouches common in military, public safety and industrial clothing and gear. A Wireless Mesh-Network Intercom device which measures 5.3x3.3x1.3-inches, weighs 10.9 ounces, uses two rechargeable 3000mAh Lithium-ion batteries, and ships standard with a 3.5-inch-high antenna, the MV-NEXUS delivers up to 17 hours of actual talk time without recharging. MULTIVOICE has also announced the MV-COMBINER, a new accessory that allows team members to simultaneously and securely share MV-NEXUS communications with a network of Push-to-Talk (PTT) & P25 radio users, thus augmenting and enhancing the functionality of PTT & P25 radio networks.

Name: Geocene
Description:
Geocene builds the world's best Stove Use Monitors (SUMs). When we need to, we do some IoT product development contract work to fund our cookstove habit.

Engineering is Easy

It's a bold claim for a premium development company to make, but it's true. The world is full of quality engineers that can build the specific feature they're asked to engineer.

Asking questions, listening to each other, and thinking hard about how each change will affect the user experience; that's what an integrated partner does to ensure success. That's how we avoid "oops."

"Oops" is what happens when engineers work in isolation to build features. Each feature is competently designed and functional - but doesn't necessarily work well as a cohesive whole.

A device built like this might have the features that customers were asking for and investors were promised, but it doesn't provide for that seamless user experience necessary to succeed in the market.

We're a Partner.

We know we've only succeeded when our clients impress their investors. Our work isn't about flash - it's about solid foundations, readable code, good long-term decisions, and capital spent on just the right portions of the project.

Being an engineering partner means that we help you think hard about the challenges you face. Our clients tend to be nimble, ready to move as their understanding of product-market fit changes over time. If you're like them, you'll appreciate our ability to adjust with you and thankful that we made the right choices from the beginning. We've spent our lifetimes solving complex problems. We can apply the lessons we've learned to your situation.

Name: EMERID SYSTEM
Description:

With Emerid System people are able to identify other people, animals or luggage and offer the solution for its need by providing:

PERSONAL INFORMATION
The personal data and photo are used to identify the user and verify that all the data provided are related to the person in order to offer the most efficient attention possible.

CONTACT INFORMATION
In cases of loss or accident, it is essential to communicate as soon as possible with the family or friends of the user.
Automatic call:Simply by pressing on the contact phone, the smartphone will make the call.

MEDICAL INFORMATION
A simple as well as complete medical record with all relevant information of the user such as allergies, medicines he could take, surgeries or any other information that can facilitate a rapid and efficient intervention by the emergency services.

EMERGENCY CALL
Quick button for emergency services direct call.

LOCATION
It allows to know the exact location of the user in order to provide optimum and efficient information to the emergency services or contact persons.

CHECK IN
Allows to notify directly to family or friends about the last security location of the user through Whatsapp, Facebook, Twitter, Email…

No APP, waterproof and can be washed into a washing machine.

We solve this with our patented, passive antenna technology that transforms coated glass and construction materials into wireless signal enablers. No power, no added layers — just seamless signal flow and sleek design.

Built on deep wireless and antenna design expertise, our solutions deliver best-in-class performance, are optimized for ultra-fast, scalable production, and maintain discreet aesthetics. That’s why forward-thinking manufacturers trust StealthCase to enhance their products.

Founded in Finland, our team is distributed across Europe and North America. What unites us is our passion for connectivity and elegant engineering that blends into the background — while powering what’s ahead.

PC.

In addition the owner can receive a text message and an email notification if: there is an attempted break-in, the vehicle driver speeds, the vehicle is in an accident, tow attempt and much more. The T2C-100 has an integrated GPS receiver that supplies on-demand vehicle location, providing peace of mind as well as confirmation of your loved-ones whereabouts.

Um für Funkprodukte die Einhaltung der Anforderungen der Funkgeräterichtlinie (Radio Equipment Directive RED 2014/53/EU) der EU und darüber hinaus die Anforderungen für Zulassungen in USA, Kanada, Japan nachweisen zu können, sind Prüfungen in unterschiedlichen Bereichen erforderlich:

Elektrische Sicherheit (Electric Safety)
Telekommunikation (Radio)
Elektromagnetische Verträglichkeit (EMC)
So verfügt die IBL-Lab GmbH über entsprechende moderne, hoch automatisierte Test- und Laboreinrichtungen, in denen Prüfdienstleistungen zu den genannten Bereichen fachlich kompetent unter Beachtung gesetzlicher sowie normativer Anforderungen erbracht werden.

Name: Progetto Wireco
Description: WiReCo (Wireless Community Network) is the first community wireless network in Western Sicily. APS Progetto Wireco is a Social Promotion Association registered as an Internet Service Provider at the Ministry of Economic Development and the R.O.C. n ° 31136 - Associated with RIPE NCC AS207434. Wireco Non-profit communication operator, born from the intuition of a group of people who, to compensate for the monopoly of traditional telecommunications operators and the lack of adequate Internet connectivity in the area, decide to set up the first non-profit communication operator of Western Sicily, able to provide broadband connectivity to members. In addition to the elimination of the Digital Divide, the association aims to provide connectivity at economically sustainable conditions through the use of appropriate technologies in compliance with current legislation. Wireco is not just an Internet Service Provider, but being a Social Promotion Association, it is linked to the area in which it operates. It promotes the culture in the technological field of the members of the Project, organizes seminars aimed at the dissemination and sustainability of new technologies through agreements with local authorities, and also supports the protection of monumental and artistic assets. Progetto Wireco intends to reduce the digital divide in all its forms, both infrastructural and cultural. For this reason, in addition to broadband Internet access, actions will be put in place to support and consolidate the use of the network through dedicated courses, especially for the most sensitive groups: children and the elderly. In particular, the Association has planned to hold courses on new technologies and the conscious use of social media.

Name: CRN Wireless
Description:
CRN Wireless is an international provider of wireless products and services that facilitate the communication and monitoring of data and alarm signals.

From monitoring devices to turnkey wireless networks and fully customized products, we offer a broad range of wireless monitoring solutions.

Security

Our wireless communicators are installed by security dealers for use in residential and commercial security alarm systems and are ideal for establishing a primary, redundant or back-up wireless communication path for security alarm signals. The devices communicate alarm signals over cellular frequencies or UHF frequencies.

Generator Monitoring

Our wireless generator monitoring devices are installed by generator maintenance companies in order to monitor the activity of automatic standby generators. The generator monitors provide 24-hour monitoring and real-time notification of critical generator events by communicating signals over cellular frequencies or UHF frequencies.

Turnkey Wireless Networks

For customers who want their own proprietary UHF network, we design and build networks that address the specific monitoring requirements of their business. Name: ERE SRL
Description:
ERE wireless is an Italian company founded in 1969 by a group of radio amateurs to provide products to the civil and industrial radio market. Their mission was to manufacture top quality products to highly skilled users.
In 45 years ERE has developed a wide variety of wireless equipment for applications in different fields (telecommunication, global positioning, industrial automation, rescue and safety).

In 2014 ERE became part of a group of companies focused in process automation equipment, which also  includes SOLEXY SRL and SOLEXY USA LCC (www.solexy.net) specialized in hazardous location telemetry equipment, for use in refineries, chemical plants, off shore platforms and mines.

The perfect synergy with the other companies in the group, together with the advantage of a more structured organization, will offer ERE the chance of a further and faster development as well as of an immediate broadening of its customer base.

MISSION 
ERE designs, develops and produces industrial radio devices for use in data transmission.
Our focus is in middle to long range transmissions between devices, operating in the VHF/UHF radio frequency spectrum.
All of our systems communicate through independent networks, not belonging to any external provider.
Our R&D department develops internally all the electronic hardware as well as all software and firmware.
Our fast and flexible expert team can quickly develop standard and customized OEM products.
All of our products are manufactured in Italy in our two plants: the historical one in Stradella (PV) and the newest one in Desenzano del Garda (BS).
Due to direct control on production, our products, both standard and customized, can be delivered in very short time.
This makes ERE the ideal partner for everything about radio transmissions.

PRODUCT RANGE
- Digital and Analog I/O wireless transceivers
- RTU and Wireless Modbus transceivers
- Radiomodems
- OEM radio modules
- Antennas

Name: Wireless Trondheim
Description:
Wireless Trondheim has the following main objectives:

1. Build and deliver wireless internet coverage in Trondheim.
2. Research and development of new wireless and mobile services.
3. Together with NTNU, to facilitate and accommodate for research and development of new products and services by offering a platform for innovation called Wireless Trondheim Living Lab.

The company began as a project for research and development at the Norwegian University of Science and Technology (NTNU) in 2005. In the autumn of 2006, several public and private partners came together to set the project in motion. September 1st 2006 became the day when Trådløse Trondheim AS (Wireless Trondheim) was founded. Just 3 weeks later on September 26th the wireless network was officially made available, making Trondheim one of Europe’s first wireless cities. 

Wireless Trondheim’s network covers large parts of the downtown and surrounding areas of Trondheim (coverage map, link). The network uses wireless technology, often referred to as “Wi-Fi” or “WLAN”, which makes it possible for users to use portable devices such as laptops or smartphones to gain access to the internet anywhere in the covered area. Access to the network is free of charge for students at NTNU, high school students in Sør-Trøndelag, as well as employees of Adresseavisen, City of Trondheim, and Sør-Trøndelag County. Other users can purchase access to the network after they connect, no subscription is required.

While managing the network is perhaps the most obvious of our activities, Wireless Trondheim also maintains several research projects.

Wireless Trondheim Livings Lab (WTLL) is a joint effort between NTNU and Wireless Trondheim with the goal of providing a test platform for new products and services. In the WTLL network students and researches can place their projects in an environment with real users and real world conditions. This combination of infrastructure and user base makes WTLL a unique testbed.
